trans_ch_5_bridge_omega_detection.title: Critical error
trans_ch_5_bridge_omega_detection.narrative: The bridge's security scanners instantly flash crimson. The AI's robotic voice echoes through the compartment: "Attention. Omega spores have been detected in the subject's body. Cleanup protocol has been activated." Ceiling turrets turn towards you before you can say anything...

trans_ch_5_showdown_absurd.title: Red button
trans_ch_5_showdown_absurd.narrative: Instead of looking for cover, you run to the captain's chair and hit the red button with a laugh.

act2_med_locked_cabinet.title: LOCKED MEDICAL CABINET
act2_med_locked_cabinet.narrative: Behind the main applicator there is a narrow cabinet with an electromechanical lock. After successful hacking, the door opens with a loud click. Inside is a whole set of field stimulators and bandages with hemostatic gel.
act2_med_locked_cabinet.thought: These supplies will greatly improve my chances.

trans_ch_1_cargo_loot_servo.title: Android analysis
trans_ch_1_cargo_loot_servo.narrative: Using the suit's basic tools, you carefully open the robot's knee joint and remove the Broken Servo. Heavy, but valuable.

trans_ch_1_escape_injured_next.title: Breakout price
trans_ch_1_escape_injured_next.narrative: Clutching the bloody bandage, you take a deep breath and cross the threshold of the airlock. Every step is a throbbing pain, but you can’t stop.
trans_ch_1_escape_injured_next.thought: Crap! Hurt! We urgently need to find a medical center.

trans_ch_1_hub_to_lore.title: Search by the wall
trans_ch_1_hub_to_lore.narrative: You move to the far wall, where the shadows are especially thick. Under the layer of dust and debris there may be something hidden that sheds light on what happened.

trans_ch_1_hub_to_lounge.title: Path to the Recreation Room
trans_ch_1_hub_to_lounge.narrative: You cross the threshold of the airlock and the atmosphere instantly changes. Ahead of you is a rest room, where, perhaps, the echo of the crew’s past life still lingers.

trans_ch_1_hub_to_trap.title: Approach to the gateway
trans_ch_1_hub_to_trap.narrative: You are approaching a massive door. The mechanism makes a threatening grinding noise, hinting that simple passage here is impossible.

trans_ch_1_start_to_skills.title: Start calibration
trans_ch_1_start_to_skills.narrative: You press the initialize button. The screen flashes green and the suit begins a deep scan of your neural impulses for calibration.
trans_ch_1_start_to_skills.thought: It's time to decide on a role.

trans_ch_1_trap_eng_clean.title: Careful dismantling
trans_ch_1_trap_eng_clean.narrative: You expertly cut off the stubborn beam. The airlock doors hiss apart, opening a clear path out.

trans_ch_1_trap_force_injured.title: Breakthrough
trans_ch_1_trap_force_injured.narrative: You take a breath and squeeze into the narrow gap with a running start. The sharp metal mercilessly tears through the protective layer of the suit, digging into the flesh.
trans_ch_1_trap_force_injured.thought: Crap! Hurt! We urgently need to find a medical center.

trans_ch_2_corridors_to_search.title: Search the corridor
trans_ch_2_corridors_to_search.narrative: You slow down, carefully inspecting the floor and walls. In the chaos of an evacuation, people often lose valuables.
trans_ch_2_corridors_to_search.thought: The devil is in the details.

trans_ch_2_do_selfie.title: Cyber ​​vanity
trans_ch_2_do_selfie.narrative: You activate the surveillance camera and strike a beautiful pose. The flash illuminates the room for a split second, drawing attention from the darkness.
trans_ch_2_do_selfie.thought: The world needs to see this!

trans_ch_2_leave_to_act3.title: Descent to the Bio-Laboratory
trans_ch_2_leave_to_act3.narrative: The elevator doors close and the cabin begins its descent with a dull rumble. You are preparing to meet the unknown of the bio-complex.

act2_security_offices.title: SECURITY SERVICE ARCHIVE
act2_security_offices.narrative: You infiltrate the destroyed security command post. Surprisingly, the terminals' backup power is still working. On the table is a Swarm Provider (Exo-Link) and a printed Station Ventilation Diagram.
act2_security_offices.thought: The ventilation scheme looks promising. Perhaps you can crawl along it to the very top...

act1_cargo_sealed_container.title: HERMAL CONTAINER
act1_cargo_sealed_container.narrative: There is a massive sealed container with a damaged lock against the wall of the sub-tier. After precise opening, the lid swings back, releasing a cloud of inert gas. Inside there is a working battery for the spacesuit and a package of radiation plates.
act1_cargo_sealed_container.thought: Useful trash. Might come in handy.

trans_ch_2_save_to_act3.title: Rescue Tobias
trans_ch_2_save_to_act3.narrative: With effort, you drag the groaning Tobias into the elevator. The doors close, cutting him off from his pursuers.

trans_ch_2_secret_take_cutter.title: Removal of the Plasma Cutter
trans_ch_2_secret_take_cutter.narrative: You attach a heavy weapon to the suit's magnetic grip. It's heavy and clumsy, but its power is enough to burn through even tank armor.

trans_ch_2_secret_take_pda.title: Seizure of the PDA
trans_ch_2_secret_take_pda.narrative: You pick up the heavy tablet. The status appears on the screen: Administrator Master Access. With this you can try to hack the Hart system.

trans_ch_3_boss_drink_oil.title: Stomach Lubricant
trans_ch_3_boss_drink_oil.narrative: In a panic before the Patriarch, you decide to drink Synthetic Oil, hoping that your insides will be covered with a protective film. The oil instantly solidifies in your esophagus.

trans_ch_3_boss_eng.title: Shorting cables
trans_ch_3_boss_eng.narrative: You quickly rip the insulation off the nearest cable and throw it into the puddle under the monster's feet. The discharge shoots upward, stunning the creature.

trans_ch_3_boss_fight.title: Application of Plasma Cutter
trans_ch_3_boss_fight.narrative: You activate the plasma cutter. A blinding beam cuts through the darkness of the laboratory, aiming straight at the creature's chest.

fail_ch_1_cargo_to_sealed_container.title: HACK FAILED
fail_ch_1_cargo_to_sealed_container.narrative: You have stripped the threads of the locking mechanism. The container is hermetically sealed and cannot be opened without special equipment.
fail_ch_1_cargo_to_sealed_container.thought: Trying again is useless. We need to look for another way.

trans_ch_3_boss_stl.title: Distraction of the Patriarch
trans_ch_3_boss_stl.narrative: You silently take out a piece of metal and throw it into the opposite corner. The Patriarch turns sharply towards the sound.

trans_ch_3_boss_to_stealth.title: Stealth menu
trans_ch_3_boss_to_stealth.narrative: You hold your breath and go into stealth mode, assessing your escape routes.
trans_ch_3_boss_to_stealth.thought: The shadow is my best ally.

trans_ch_3_boss_yolo.title: Reckless Rush
trans_ch_3_boss_yolo.narrative: You throw all caution to the wind and run forward. This is pure recklessness.

fail_ch_1_cargo_shortcut.title: HACK FAILED
fail_ch_1_cargo_shortcut.narrative: You try to pry the massive bolt, but the flat spring of the lock breaks. The freight elevator gate mechanism freezes dead in the closed position. The cut through the shaft is no longer available.
fail_ch_1_cargo_shortcut.thought: Trying again is useless. We need to look for another way.

fail_ch_1_skip_to_act4.title: HACK FAILED
fail_ch_1_skip_to_act4.narrative: You drive a crowbar into the crack of the emergency hatch, but break the thread of the lock. The hatch is hermetically sealed - the direct path to the power unit is now closed.
fail_ch_1_skip_to_act4.thought: Trying again is useless. We need to look for another way.

fail_ch_1_hub_loot_crowbar.title: HACK FAILED
fail_ch_1_hub_loot_crowbar.narrative: The fragments of the cladding cut too deeply into the ceilings. You damage the last fastenings, and the blockage completely blocks access to the crowbar.
fail_ch_1_hub_loot_crowbar.thought: Trying again is useless. We need to look for another way.

fail_ch_2_hub_to_secret.title: HACK FAILED
fail_ch_2_hub_to_secret.narrative: The circular lock of the SB door does not respond. After an unsuccessful attempt, the mechanism activated the internal lock - the door was jammed.
fail_ch_2_hub_to_secret.thought: Trying again is useless. We need to look for another way.

fail_ch_2_lounge_to_security.title: HACK FAILED
fail_ch_2_lounge_to_security.narrative: You pull the handle of the reception desk, but the lock slips off the groove. The box is locked forever, the path to the Security Service offices is blocked.
fail_ch_2_lounge_to_security.thought: Trying again is useless. We need to look for another way.

fail_ch_3_hub_to_ai.title: HACK FAILED
fail_ch_3_hub_to_ai.narrative: You enter a sequence, but the terminal discards it. Protection has worked: The AI ​​core is locked, and hacking is no longer possible.
fail_ch_3_hub_to_ai.thought: Trying again is useless. We need to look for another way.

fail_ch_3_hub_to_lore.title: HACK FAILED
fail_ch_3_hub_to_lore.narrative: The archive terminal rejected the graphic key. The hard drive went into protective mode, and access to the logs was lost.
fail_ch_3_hub_to_lore.thought: Trying again is useless. We need to look for another way.

fail_ch_3_hart_exploit.title: HACK FAILED
fail_ch_3_hart_exploit.narrative: The Director's PDA is connected, but Hart managed to activate the manual lock. The intercom terminal has burned out, and remote interception of the Isolate is impossible.
fail_ch_3_hart_exploit.thought: Trying again is useless. We need to look for another way.

trans_ch_3_hart_accept.title: Acceptance of terms and conditions
trans_ch_3_hart_accept.narrative: You nod at the camera. The path to the reactor compartment is open, and you go there knowing the risks.
trans_ch_3_hart_accept.thought: I do what I have to do.

trans_ch_3_hart_exploit.title: Remote interception
trans_ch_3_hart_exploit.narrative: You connect the Director's PDA to the intercom terminal. Hart's face pales as the automatic gateway security system obeys your command. Technical drones, bypassing her will, extract Isolate Omega from the depths of the reactor and deliver it to the airlock right at your feet. You didn't have to go down into the nest!

trans_ch_3_hub_to_hart.title: Approach to the bunker
trans_ch_3_hub_to_hart.narrative: You approach the massive bunker door. The intercom comes alive, awaiting your presence.

fail_ch_4_engines_pda_win.title: HACK FAILED
fail_ch_4_engines_pda_win.narrative: The master code was not accepted by the damaged engine AI. Servo locking has become stronger and manual reset via PDA is no longer available.
fail_ch_4_engines_pda_win.thought: Trying again is useless. We need to look for another way.

fail_ch_2_med_to_locked_cabinet.title: HACK FAILED
fail_ch_2_med_to_locked_cabinet.narrative: You bent the flat spring of the lock, and the electric mechanism clamped the bolt dead. The medical cabinet is now closed forever - hacking again is useless.
fail_ch_2_med_to_locked_cabinet.thought: Trying again is useless. We need to look for another way.

fail_ch_5_showdown_hack.title: HACK FAILED
fail_ch_5_showdown_hack.narrative: The bridge's security protocol repelled the attack. The turrets are in combat mode, and the PDA port is melted—breaking the defense is impossible.
fail_ch_5_showdown_hack.thought: Trying again is useless. We need to look for another way.

trans_ch_5_showdown_crowbar.title: Crowbar in the turret mechanism
trans_ch_5_showdown_crowbar.narrative: You jam the Heavy Crowbar into the gap of the rotary servo of the nearest turret. The metal grinds, the engine stalls, and the cannon freezes, its barrel resting against the adjacent turret. The secondary explosion sends sparks flying, but passage to the terminal is clear.
trans_ch_5_showdown_crowbar.thought: The good old lever is better than any electronics.

trans_ch_3_hub_to_lore.title: Hacking the terminal
trans_ch_3_hub_to_lore.narrative: You connect to the terminal. The screen flashes, offering access to classified archives.

trans_ch_3_hub_to_med.title: Path to the medical cabinet
trans_ch_3_hub_to_med.narrative: You head towards the medicine cabinet, hoping to find something that will heal your wounds.

trans_ch_5_showdown_battery.title: Shield Pulse
trans_ch_5_showdown_battery.narrative: You grab the Spare Battery and plug it into the emergency socket on your chest plate. For a split second, the kinetic shield flares, deflecting the first volley of lasers. Under the cover of that single splash, you rush to the center console.
trans_ch_5_showdown_battery.thought: One charge is enough for exactly one jerk.

trans_ch_3_med_back.title: Exit from the medical station
trans_ch_3_med_back.narrative: Closing the closet, you return to the center of the hub, feeling a little better.

ending_3_bad.title: LAST ORDER
ending_3_bad.narrative: You drag Tobias into the destroyed shuttle cabin. Behind the portholes are the last flashes of plasma and the roar of creatures. The enemy is rushing from the stern, and there is no time to think. “Tobias, cover me,” you say. He nods, exhales hoarsely, and raises the barrel. Shots. Scream. Heavy fire covers the cabin; A few bullets pierce your shoulder, but Tobias takes most of the charge. When you get to the launch pad, he's already on the floor, mortally wounded but still breathing. You grab him by the arm and drag him towards the exit. The shuttle lifts off. Tobias doesn't move.
ending_3_bad.thought: You gave the order. He complied. Now you carry it further.

trans_ch_3_nest_hug_monster.title: Blind Mercy
trans_ch_3_nest_hug_monster.narrative: She moves her mustache so funny! She's probably just scared in this dark nest...

ending_7.title: 🏆 ENDING: STEEL COCOON
ending_7.narrative: Three months after the fall of Nemesis, a corporation search party discovers a charred but surviving engineering cryo-pod at the epicenter of the crater. The mechanisms click open. You go outside, your mind is clear, the corporation chip is dead, and your memory is completely back.

act4_climb_power.title: ENERGY REDISTRIBUTION
act4_climb_power.narrative: The suit's systems make it possible to redirect emergency energy to one of the subsystems to overcome obstacles.

trans_ch_3_reactor_escape_clean.title: Escape through the ventilation
trans_ch_3_reactor_escape_clean.narrative: Choking from the smoke, you knock out the air duct grate and crawl into the elevator shafts. A dull explosion is heard behind - the reactor sector is isolated forever.

trans_ch_3_start_to_cryo.title: Entrance to the cryo-compartment
trans_ch_3_start_to_cryo.narrative: You cross the threshold of the cryogenic compartment. The temperature instantly drops and the breath turns to steam.

trans_ch_4_climb_universal_fallback.title: Standard lift
trans_ch_4_climb_universal_fallback.narrative: You are not burdened with wounded comrades and heavy equipment from past acts. Your goal is simply to survive and get to the reactor compartment. You start to climb.

trans_ch_4_gravity_test.title: Gravity check
trans_ch_4_gravity_test.narrative: Curiosity takes over. You throw a heavy key to test how gravity works in this anomalous zone.

act3_boss_stealth.title: SECRET ACTIONS
act3_boss_stealth.narrative: You assess the situation, trying not to make a sound. The blind Patriarch reacts to any vibration in the air.
act3_boss_stealth.thought: You need to act quietly or use deception.

act3_boss_combat.title: COMBAT TACTICS
act3_boss_combat.narrative: A direct confrontation with the Patriarch is suicidal, but you can use the environment and weapons.
act3_boss_combat.thought: You need to hit exactly the vulnerable spots.

trans_ch_2_hub_to_rec.title: Entrance to the Recreation Room
trans_ch_2_hub_to_rec.narrative: The crunch of glass under boots echoes down the corridor. You enter the crew's former resting place.

trans_ch_4_phase2_fall_tobias.title: Catastrophe
trans_ch_4_phase2_fall_tobias.narrative: The overload becomes unbearable. Without additional power in the hydraulics or passive servos, your knees break with a terrible sound. Under the wild cry of your partner, you both fall into the abyss.

trans_ch_4_reactor_to_engines_srv.title: Path through supply
trans_ch_4_reactor_to_engines_srv.narrative: Tightening the spacesuit straps and ignoring warnings about the toxicity of the fuel, you forcefully break down the hatch and squeeze into the corridors of the maneuvering complex. Your experience tells me that if you activate the engines, the fall will stop.

trans_ch_5_showdown_tobias.title: Order to Tobias
trans_ch_5_showdown_tobias.narrative: Tobias, overcoming the hellish pain from his lost leg, slides off your shoulders and throws up the captured machine gun: “Run to the console, Marcus! I'll take down these damn guns! While he is pouring lead on the turrets, taking retaliatory hits on his body armor, you break through to the terminal.

trans_ch_2_hub_to_tobias.title: Entrance to the radio room
trans_ch_2_hub_to_tobias.narrative: Someone's hoarse breathing can be heard through the communication interference. You decisively open the door to the radio room.

trans_ch_1_repair_servo.title: Servo drive repair
trans_ch_1_repair_servo.narrative: Using engineering tools, you tinker with the servo. The hydraulics of the legs are rumbling quite - the load-carrying capacity of the spacesuit has been significantly increased!

trans_ch_5_showdown_hack.title: Hacking Defense
trans_ch_5_showdown_hack.narrative: You promptly connect the Director's secure PDA, found in Act 2, to the service port of the gateway. Corporate Master Codes instantly take over priority. The laser turrets turn off with a squeal and retract back into their slots. The path to the main terminal is clear.

trans_ch_5_showdown_ref.title: Tactical tackle
trans_ch_5_showdown_ref.narrative: Your augmentations and combat experience as a stormtrooper work flawlessly. You fall onto the slippery metal floor, flying under a grid of heat rays. With one precise blow from a heavy tool, you rip out the main power cable from the distribution board by the roots. The bridge plunges into emergency twilight, defense systems go out.

act1_lore_pad.title: ENGINEER BLAKE'S TABLET
act1_lore_pad.narrative: Among the rubble you find the chief engineer's broken PDA. The log file reads: “They broke through from the bio-labs into the residential sector in minutes. Weapons do not take them, they adapt... We are welding the disposal gates to give the others time. If you are reading this, run to the reactor."
act1_lore_pad.thought: They? Who was he talking about? It appears that the accident at the station was not caused by a technical failure.

act2_lore_newspaper.title: NEWSPAPER PIECE
act2_lore_newspaper.narrative: On the floor lies a printout of the corporate newsletter: “Dr. Elizabeth Hart announced the successful completion of the first phase of Project Omega. The mutagen showed 100% survival rate on experimental tissues..."
act2_lore_newspaper.thought: Project Omega. This means they created those creatures.

act2_secret_office.title: 🚪 OFFICE OF THE HEAD OF SB
act2_secret_office.narrative: You open a jammed airlock door using an emergency crowbar. Inside there are traces of a hasty evacuation, broken monitors and stains of dried blood. However, the security chief's safe is slightly open. On the table lies the Station Director's protected PDA and a heavy industrial miner's plasma cutter, fully charged.
act2_secret_office.thought: It’s worth searching everything here quickly before the security systems completely block this sector.

trans_ch_5_showdown_yolo.title: Reckless Rush
trans_ch_5_showdown_yolo.narrative: You don't have the right tools or tactical advantage. You just run forward through open space. The turret laser markers instantly converge on your chest. A volley of plasma burns right through your suit, throwing your lifeless body back into the shaft.

trans_ch_5_start_next.title: Approach to the terminal
trans_ch_5_start_next.narrative: You take the plunge towards the central terminal. The entire story of your survival has led to this moment.
trans_ch_5_start_next.thought: My entire chain of decisions led to this.

trans_ch_2_hub_to_med.title: The path to the medical post
trans_ch_2_hub_to_med.narrative: You approach a flashing green cross on the wall. The hope of a quick healing gives me strength.
trans_ch_2_hub_to_med.thought: The wounds need to be healed.

trans_ch_1_explore_to_junk.title: Searching in the rubble
trans_ch_1_explore_to_junk.narrative: You approach a pile of twisted metal. The smell of ozone and rust hits your nose. You'll have to dig around to find anything useful.
trans_ch_1_explore_to_junk.thought: I hope there is something of value here.

trans_ch_1_trap_luck_clean.title: Random combination
trans_ch_1_trap_luck_clean.narrative: Incredibly, the relay shorted exactly as it should! The lock clicked and completely cleared the passage.
trans_ch_1_trap_luck_clean.thought: Fortune is on my side today.

trans_ch_1_trap_stl_clean.title: Silent passage
trans_ch_1_trap_stl_clean.narrative: You carefully lubricate the grooves of the sash with oil and silently slip into the resulting gap, without making a sound.

trans_ch_1_skill_eng.title: Profile selection: Engineer
trans_ch_1_skill_eng.narrative: You confirm your choice in the suit interface. The neural network redistributes resources, and you feel how new technical reflexes and knowledge emerge in your memory.
trans_ch_1_skill_eng.thought: Now I see right through the system.

trans_ch_2_bypass_act3_4.title: Ventilation breakthrough
trans_ch_2_bypass_act3_4.narrative: The duct map did not disappoint. You climb into a narrow pipe and, bypassing Doctor Hart's bio-laboratories and the exploding reactor, crawl right under the dashboard of the Command Bridge!

trans_ch_2_corridors_to_rooms.title: Inspection of compartments
trans_ch_2_corridors_to_rooms.narrative: You head towards a row of pressure doors. Each of them can hide both salvation and a new threat.

trans_ch_2_bypass_to_bridge.title: Ascent to the bridge
trans_ch_2_bypass_to_bridge.narrative: The difficult climb in conditions of increasing gravity is behind us. In front of you is a service panel, behind which the final section begins.

trans_ch_2_get_clips.title: Search for clamps
trans_ch_2_get_clips.narrative: Among the pile of papers you find a pack of durable steel office clips. Why do you need them? Who knows.
trans_ch_2_get_clips.thought: Maybe they will come in handy.

trans_ch_2_hub_to_hydro.title: Login to Hydroponics
trans_ch_2_hub_to_hydro.narrative: You open the airlock and thick, damp fog rushes out. The smell of rotten leaves and chemicals fills the helmet.
trans_ch_2_hub_to_hydro.thought: It smells like the jungle in here.

trans_ch_2_hub_to_lore.title: Studying papers
trans_ch_2_hub_to_lore.narrative: You crouch down and pick up the crumpled piece of paper. The ink is a little smeared, but the text is still readable.

trans_ch_1_skill_luck.title: Profile Selection: Luck
trans_ch_1_skill_luck.narrative: You confirm your choice in the suit interface. The neural network redistributes resources, and you feel your intuition sharpen to the limit.

trans_ch_1_skill_ref.title: Profile Selection: Assault
trans_ch_1_skill_ref.narrative: You confirm your choice in the suit interface. The neural network redistributes resources, and you feel how new combat reflexes emerge in your memory.

trans_ch_1_skill_srv.title: Profile Selection: Survival
trans_ch_1_skill_srv.narrative: You confirm your choice in the suit interface. The neural network redistributes resources, and you feel the senses necessary for survival intensify.
trans_ch_1_skill_srv.thought: Nature will teach me how to survive.

trans_ch_1_skill_stl.title: Profile Selection: Scout
trans_ch_1_skill_stl.narrative: You confirm your choice in the suit interface. The neural network redistributes resources, and you feel how new stealth skills emerge in your memory.
trans_ch_1_skill_stl.thought: The shadow is my best ally.

trans_ch_1_skip_to_act4.title: Elevator shaft hacking
trans_ch_1_skip_to_act4.narrative: Using engineering knowledge and the sheer power of a crowbar, you pry open the doors of an old elevator shaft. Power cables go down.
trans_ch_1_skip_to_act4.thought: Great maneuver. Saving time is everything.

trans_ch_2_hydro_srv.title: Cutting a corridor
trans_ch_2_hydro_srv.narrative: Using your innate knowledge of extreme flora, you accurately prune the supporting nodes of mutated vines. They fall powerlessly, freeing up a clear passage to the main elevator.

trans_ch_2_hydro_stl.title: Hidden passage
trans_ch_2_hydro_stl.narrative: You freeze, matching the rhythm of your steps to the slow pulsations of the plants. Your suit slips under the blind vines without touching a single poisonous thorn.

trans_ch_2_launch_capsule.title: Manual reset
trans_ch_2_launch_capsule.narrative: The lever gives in with a terrible grinding noise. The automation shoots the container into the icy abyss. You are free.

trans_ch_2_loot_chronometer.title: Finding a Chronometer
trans_ch_2_loot_chronometer.narrative: Among the shards of quartz glass you find a strange prototype of a pocket device. It flickers with a soft blue light, defying the laws of physics. You take it away.
trans_ch_2_loot_chronometer.thought: What kind of technology is this?

trans_ch_2_lounge_to_security.title: Search for SB key
trans_ch_2_lounge_to_security.narrative: You walk around the counter and find the key card. The doors to the Security Service office click open in front of you.

trans_ch_2_med_back.title: Exit from the medical station
trans_ch_2_med_back.narrative: You take the last ampoules and leave the medical station. The wounds are healed, it's time to move on.

trans_ch_2_rec_drink_oil.title: Cryogenic sip
trans_ch_2_rec_drink_oil.narrative: Yielding to a mad impulse, you open the valve of your helmet and take a sip of the thick blue liquid. The cold immediately constricts my throat.

trans_ch_2_rec_take_oil.title: Oil withdrawal
trans_ch_2_rec_take_oil.narrative: You carefully pour the remaining thick blue oil into an airtight container on the suit's belt. Now you have an excellent technical lubricant.

trans_ch_2_rec_to_hydro.title: Opening the gateway
trans_ch_2_rec_to_hydro.narrative: You turn the valve of the adjacent airlock. The mechanism resists, but gives in, opening the way to hydroponics.

trans_ch_2_sabotage_escape.title: Container preparation
trans_ch_2_sabotage_escape.narrative: You use the Heavy Plasma Cutter to cut the fuses on the airlock, and your survival skills help you calculate the minimum supply of oxygen in the container.

trans_ch_2_security_take_items.title: Seizure of security items
trans_ch_2_security_take_items.narrative: You take the Swarm Provider (Exo-Link) and load the Ventilation Circuit into the PDA. Now you see the entire network of hidden air ducts of the station.

trans_ch_2_start_next.title: Entrance to the residential sector
trans_ch_2_start_next.narrative: You are taking the first step deeper into the residential sector. Тишина здесь давит на уши, а странные жилы на стенах пульсируют в такт твоему сердцу.

act5_bridge.title: CHECKING SYSTEMS AND STATUS
act5_bridge.narrative: You approach the main communications terminal. The on-board computer begins scanning your inventory, status flags and election history to generate an evacuation protocol.
act5_bridge.thought: It's time to draw the line...

trans_ch_2_tobias_bleed_fail.title: The smell of blood
trans_ch_2_tobias_bleed_fail.narrative: You feel the warmth spreading down your leg. A quiet, hungry hiss comes from the darkness of the ventilation. The creature came to the smell.

trans_ch_2_tobias_leave.title: Single route
trans_ch_2_tobias_leave.narrative: You leave Tobias in the radio room, locking the security door behind you at his request. Your speed is maximum, but the cats are scratching your soul.

trans_ch_2_tobias_save.title: Heavy burden
trans_ch_2_tobias_save.narrative: You lift the wounded Tobias onto your shoulders. He groans in pain, his weight greatly slows down your movements, and the suit’s sensors warn of increased energy consumption.

trans_ch_3_boss_annihilate.title: Destruction of the Patriarch
trans_ch_3_boss_annihilate.narrative: You activate the plasma cutter at full power. The blinding beam burns through the chitin and tissue of the monster. The creature falls dead. From her skull you extract the surviving Quantum Swarm Provider!

trans_ch_3_boss_bleed_fail.title: The smell of blood
trans_ch_3_boss_bleed_fail.narrative: A drop of blood falls on the metal floor. The Patriarch turns his head sharply, his membranes vibrating from your scent. He smelled you instantly.

trans_ch_3_boss_kill_to_hub.title: Step through the remains
trans_ch_3_boss_kill_to_hub.narrative: You step over the charred body of the Patriarch. The air smells of ozone and burnt flesh. The way is clear.

trans_ch_3_boss_luck.title: Incredible luck
trans_ch_3_boss_luck.narrative: Incredible accident! The creature takes a blind step to the side, and its clawed paw lands directly on a sparkling high-voltage cable. A terrible discharge of current throws the Blind Patriarch back into the darkness, giving you precious time to rush to the nest.
trans_ch_3_boss_luck.thought: Fortune is on my side today.

trans_ch_3_boss_ref.title: Membrane cutting
trans_ch_3_boss_ref.narrative: You make a lightning lunge. The blade of the cutter rips open the creature's auditory membranes, depriving it of its main sense.

trans_ch_3_boss_srv.title: Masking with pheromones
trans_ch_3_boss_srv.narrative: You quickly break the emergency container and smear the caustic mucus of a dead Swarm specimen all over your suit. The Patriarch moves his blind muzzle just a couple of centimeters from your helmet, noisily inhaling air, but, uttering a guttural roar, he turns around and goes into the ventilation. The path is clear.

trans_ch_3_choice_hart.title: Deal with Hart
trans_ch_3_choice_hart.narrative: You pass the container through the gateway. Hart nods, and the mechanism gives you the promised Quantum Carrier.

trans_ch_3_choice_self.title: Strain introduction
trans_ch_3_choice_self.narrative: With trembling hands, you bring the injector to the port on your neck. The cold spreads through the veins, burning away the corporate code.

trans_ch_3_choice_vent.title: Ventilation release
trans_ch_3_choice_vent.narrative: You hit the flask with force against the ventilation grille. Violet gas instantly rushes into the mines, filling the station.
trans_ch_3_choice_vent.thought: Burn everything with a blue flame.

trans_ch_3_cryo_proceed.title: Step into the cryo-compartment
trans_ch_3_cryo_proceed.narrative: You take a step into the frosty fog. Frost-covered capsules reflect the light of your lantern like the eyes of ghosts.

act4_climb_phase2.title: GRAVITATIONAL SHIFT
act4_climb_phase2.narrative: There are a few meters left to the reactor deck pressure seal, but suddenly the left elevator holding cable breaks. The station tilts sharply to one side, artificial gravity goes crazy, trying to tear you away from the wall and throw you into the plasma vent below.
act4_climb_phase2.thought: My hands... the suit's hydraulics are at their limit. If I carry Tobias, the load is lethal.

ending_2.title: 🏆 ENDING: BURNING OF JERICHO
ending_2.narrative: You overloaded the reactor and destroyed Isolate Omega. A powerful EMP flash burns out all the station’s servers, the chip in your head and completely erases the Swarm virus. The Nemesis station turns into a giant fiery meteor and completely burns up in the dense layers of the atmosphere along with you. The corporation will never get these weapons.
ending_2.thought: I'm dying as a man. Omega's secret will die with me.

act4_cryo_regen.title: CRYO-CAPSULE OF REGENERATION
act4_cryo_regen.narrative: In the technical gateway you find a medical cryopod for engineers. It is fully functional. The internal AI offers to perform express surgery and heal all physical wounds, but this will take time.
act4_cryo_regen.thought: The capsule will cure me, but I will lose precious minutes. The station is falling faster.

ending_3.title: 🏆 ENDING: ALLIANCE PROTOCOL
ending_3.narrative: An incredible outcome. You saved Tobias, outsmarted Hart, took the Quantum Carrier, and healed yourself. The Vanguard shuttle leaves at full speed towards a distant rebel colony. A wounded but alive Tobias sits next to you in the co-pilot's seat. You have all the corporation's secrets in your hands, ready to be published on the free web.
ending_3.thought: We will show the whole world what they did here... we will start this war.

act3_start.title: ENTRANCE TO THE BIO-COMPLEX
act3_start.narrative: The complex's heavy pressure doors part, releasing a cloud of icy steam. The HUD interface turns yellow warning: a critical level of biological threat has been detected. Shards of ampoules and frozen organic matter crunch underfoot.
act3_start.thought: It smells like formaldehyde and rotten meat. Dr. Hart is somewhere inside.

act4_climb.title: VERTICAL LIFT
act4_climb.narrative: The main bridge to the reactor has been destroyed. The only way is to climb up the dilapidated vertical shaft of a technical elevator. Pieces of sheathing and sparks fly towards you, and thick smoke rises from below.
act4_climb.thought: Physically it will be difficult. I hope my legs can handle this load.

trans_ch_3_med_heal.title: Application of a regenerator
trans_ch_3_med_heal.narrative: You inject the regenerator. Pleasant warmth spreads throughout the body, healing wounds and clearing consciousness.

trans_ch_3_nest_hck.title: Software extraction
trans_ch_3_nest_hck.narrative: You connect the decoder to the console. Codes run across the screen, neatly extracting strain data without biomass alarm.

ending_9_space_drift.title: ENDING #9: SPACE hulk
ending_9_space_drift.narrative: The container breaks away from the dying Nemesis with a roar. The lights of explosions flash behind - the station is falling apart. You are flying in an icy void, walled up in an iron box. The suspended animation sensors are activated. You fall asleep, hoping that in a couple of hundred years this container will be picked up by a passing cargo ship... Humanity has been saved from the infection, but at what cost?
ending_9_space_drift.thought: You escaped alone, leaving the station to fate.

act4_cryo_vault.title: ANBIOSED TOMB
act4_cryo_vault.narrative: You find yourself in an isolated deep-frozen compartment. Colonist prototypes are stored here. The computer is fine. You can use one of the capsules to put yourself into suspended animation and wait out the disaster.
act4_cryo_vault.thought: If the station falls, the capsule will protect you. But who will dig you up?

ending_10_cryo_sleep.title: ENDING #10: ETERNAL PASSENGER
ending_10_cryo_sleep.narrative: The capsule closes with a hiss. Icy gas fills my lungs. You fall asleep. Nemesis Station falls to the planet, turning into a pile of rubble, but your reinforced cryo-cocoon withstands the impact. Centuries pass. Omega spores are dying of starvation. Your capsule continues to lie under a layer of radioactive ash...
ending_10_cryo_sleep.thought: You have outlived everyone. But they were left absolutely alone.

trans_ch_3_nest_luck.title: Blind luck
trans_ch_3_nest_luck.narrative: You decide to take a risk. While you are reaching for the flask, the reactor systems malfunction, and a couple of flashes of fire scare away the biomass. You manage to snatch the Isolate out without a single scratch!
trans_ch_3_nest_luck.thought: Fortune is on my side today.

act4_fall.title: 💀 FALL INTO THE REACTOR
act4_fall.narrative: A body weakened by wounds or overload from the wounded Tobias played a fatal role. The hand fell from the icy cable. You flew down into the glowing flames of the damaged plasma circuit of the reactor. Death was instant.

trans_ch_cryo_end_trigger.title: Start freezing
trans_ch_cryo_end_trigger.narrative: You lie down inside, batten down the hatch and press the start button. Coldness instantly envelops the consciousness.

act4_start.title: POWER UNIT: ENTRY POINT
act4_start.narrative: The Power Unit sector greets you with a deafening roar of escaping steam. The reactor cooling lines have been destroyed. The station has entered the dense layers of the atmosphere, and the orange glow of the burning hull is blazing outside the porthole windows. The force of gravity is growing every minute.
act4_start.thought: If I don't make it to the reactor hall, the station will fall apart in the air before I even reach the rescue shuttle.

act4_reactor_choice.title: HEART OF THE STATION
act4_reactor_choice.narrative: You break into the reactor control room. The huge plasma core is unstable, magnetic traps spark. The control console is locked by the station's AI security protocols.
act4_reactor_choice.thought: I have two options: try to stabilize the reactor to slow the fall, or completely overload the circuit with a powerful electromagnetic pulse.

act5_start.title: FINAL FRONTIER
act5_start.narrative: The elevator doors open right on the station's Command Bridge. Through the panoramic windows one can see the planet's huge atmosphere engulfed in flames. The station vibrates so much that the metal groans. In the center of the bridge is the main terminal and the Avangard rescue shuttle.
act5_start.thought: That's all. The finale of the journey. Now the fate of the data, the station, and my own will be decided.

trans_ch_3_nest_ref.title: Swift Dash
trans_ch_3_nest_ref.narrative: Your reaction saves your life. In a split second you grab the flask, and when the biomass suddenly awakens and throws out bone spikes, you do a perfect somersault back, escaping with only fear.

trans_ch_3_nest_srv.title: Manual extraction
trans_ch_3_nest_srv.narrative: You grab the flask and tear it from living flesh. The acidic mucus burns your gloves, but you hold on to the reward.

trans_ch_3_nest_stl.title: Silent extraction
trans_ch_3_nest_stl.narrative: Using the suit's hidden modules, you glide smoothly between the pulsating veins. Your movements are quieter than a sigh. You carefully remove the flask with the Isolate without disturbing any of the larvae.

trans_ch_4_climb_magnetometer.title: Using the Magnetometer
trans_ch_4_climb_magnetometer.narrative: The device clearly registers field fluctuations. You calculate a completely safe corridor and proceed to the engine controls without any skill checks.

trans_ch_4_climb_power_hydraulics.title: Drive overload
trans_ch_4_climb_power_hydraulics.narrative: The suit's hydraulics respond with a powerful roar. Your lifting capacity and pushing power are now doubled. An excellent base for carrying heavy loads.

act3_reactor_overload.title: 🚨 CRITICAL OVERLOAD
act3_reactor_overload.narrative: You overloaded the reactor and destroyed Isolate Omega. The cooling systems instantly turned off, the plasma circuit was destabilized. The room is filled with a blinding light, emergency sirens are deafening, and the automation tightly blocks the sector's pressure doors. Time passes by seconds, the radiation background is rapidly growing, burning out the electronics of the spacesuit.
act3_reactor_overload.thought: We urgently need to look for a workaround through technical collectors, before the corridors turn into a branch of the sun.

act4_death_gravity.title: DEATH: NEWTON'S LAW
act4_death_gravity.narrative: Finding yourself in a zone of abnormally high gravity in front of the reactor, you decide to test the laws of physics and throw up a heavy wrench at 32. Under the influence of 5G, the wrench returns back at the speed of a bullet, piercing your headlamp along with your skull.

trans_ch_4_climb_power_magnets.title: Maximizing Magnets
trans_ch_4_climb_power_magnets.narrative: The magnetic relays snap onto the shaft guides with such force that you almost get pinned against the wall. It's almost impossible to get you out of here now.
trans_ch_4_climb_power_magnets.thought: Now I'm chained to the wall.

trans_ch_4_climb_power_shields.title: Shield activation
trans_ch_4_climb_power_shields.narrative: You're redirecting power to the baffles. A faint flickering field flashes around the suit. The speed of movement decreases, but you are protected from external blows.

trans_ch_4_climb_servo_godmode.title: Climbing with Tobias
trans_ch_4_climb_servo_godmode.narrative: Your suit's modified hydraulics can easily handle the weight of your wounded partner. You confidently and quickly walk up the cables of the mine, ignoring the gravitational blows.

trans_ch_4_climb_solo_skip.title: Speed ​​climb
trans_ch_4_climb_solo_skip.narrative: You have passed the central sections of the station. You have no wounded behind you, but there is no place to expect support from. You activate the suit's magnetic grips.

trans_ch_4_cryo_absurd.title: Absurd check
trans_ch_4_cryo_absurd.narrative: You decide to check whether the temperature of liquid nitrogen is really that low. Your tongue instantly freezes tightly to the metal. While trying to free yourself, you accidentally pull the emergency pressure valve. A jet of liquid nitrogen instantly turns Marcus into an ice statue, which crashes into fragments.

trans_ch_4_engines_isolate_exploit.title: Biomechanics
trans_ch_4_engines_isolate_exploit.narrative: Crazy idea! You break the ampoule with Isolate directly into the hydraulic receiver. The aggressive mutagen instantly reacts with traces of the Swarm's organics, causing the jammed bio-growths on the pistons to convulsively contract and release the metal. The valves open, releasing the plasma accelerators!

trans_ch_4_engines_manual_burn.title: Manual closing
trans_ch_4_engines_manual_burn.narrative: You don't have access keys. You tear off the protective casing and grab with your hands the cables under voltage of thousands of volts. A terrible electric shock throws you to the floor, burning out the internal systems of the suit and damaging the nervous system, but the spark reaches the injectors - the engines start!

trans_ch_4_to_engine_deck.title: Breakthrough to engines
trans_ch_4_to_engine_deck.narrative: You ignore the reactor and rush towards the engines. Your engineering expertise allows you to redirect the flow of antimatter.

ending_4.title: 🏆 ENDING: BIO-INTEGRATION
ending_4.narrative: You refused to destroy the chip and reached a critical level of toxicosis and infection. On the Command Bridge, your human consciousness finally fades away. The Omega Virus completely rearranges your synapses. You are no longer Marcus Raine. You are the only Mind of the Swarm. The station falls on an inhabited planet, and inside it beat the hearts of thousands of Morphs ready to land. The station will become a capsule of infection of the new world.
ending_4.thought: WE... ARE... WE EXIST... WE GO...

trans_ch_4_engines_pda_win.title: Hacking engines
trans_ch_4_engines_pda_win.narrative: You connect a secure PDA to the main injector. The Director's master key instantly shuts up the station's crazy AI. The automation unlocks the servos, the heavy pistons slide into place, and the engines begin the braking cycle as normal. You're safe.

trans_ch_4_phase2_hydraulics_win.title: Hydraulic squeezing
trans_ch_4_phase2_hydraulics_win.narrative: The suit's motors howl heart-rendingly, the indicators glow crimson, but the powerful leg drives can withstand Tobias' monstrous mass. With a powerful jerk, you throw yourself and your partner onto the hard floor of the reactor hall.

trans_ch_4_phase2_luck_win.title: Blind luck
trans_ch_4_phase2_luck_win.narrative: Incredible! The whipped steel cable wraps around the torn beam right under your feet, forming a temporary bridge. You quickly step over the dangerous area.
trans_ch_4_phase2_luck_win.thought: Fortune is on my side today.

trans_ch_4_phase2_magboots_win.title: Fixation with magnets
trans_ch_4_phase2_magboots_win.narrative: Whether it's the activated energy of magnets or your engineered Magnetic Boots, the soles are tightly welded to the rail. You don't care about the gravity shift. After calmly waiting out the vibration, you reach the top.
trans_ch_4_phase2_magboots_win.thought: Now I'm chained to the wall.

trans_ch_4_phase2_solo_clean.title: Final push
trans_ch_4_phase2_solo_clean.narrative: Since you are traveling light and not burdened by a wounded officer, your basic strength is enough to ignore the tilt of the station and deftly climb into the open reactor airlock.

trans_ch_4_reactor_stabilize.title: Core stabilization
trans_ch_4_reactor_stabilize.narrative: You redirect energy flows, stabilizing the magnetic field. The core stops pulsing menacingly.

trans_ch_4_reactor_to_engines_eng.title: Network reconfiguration
trans_ch_4_reactor_to_engines_eng.narrative: You're reconfiguring the distribution network. The HUD navigates the route through the emergency sewer to the southern boosters. There is still a chance to save the station itself!

trans_ch_engine_end.title: Pulse activation
trans_ch_engine_end.narrative: Your hands find the main switch. You pull it down, sending one last pulse into the engines.

trans_ch_4_regen_use.title: Capsule activation
trans_ch_4_regen_use.narrative: You go into the capsule. The mechanical arms begin an emergency healing procedure, ignoring alarms that the station is falling.

trans_ch_4_start_to_climb.title: Beginning of the climb
trans_ch_4_start_to_climb.narrative: You cling to the first ledge in the shaft. A grueling vertical climb lies ahead.

trans_ch_4_start_to_regen.title: Login to tech. compartment
trans_ch_4_start_to_regen.narrative: You turn into the side technical compartment. The silhouette of a cryo-capsule is visible ahead.

trans_ch_4_to_cryo_stasis.title: Launching suspended animation
trans_ch_4_to_cryo_stasis.narrative: Secure access codes put the capsule into autonomous disaster survival mode. Systems isolate you from the outside world.

act2_tobias_feed_result.title: UNEXPECTED HELP
act2_tobias_feed_result.narrative: Tobias unwraps the packaging with difficulty, looks at the ancient candy bar with disbelief, but still takes a bite. “It’s disgusting... but thank you, Marcus,” he croaks, and this strange gesture lifts his spirit. Finding his strength, he tightens his grip on the tourniquet on your leg, effectively stopping your bleeding.
act2_tobias_feed_result.thought: The bleeding has stopped. Much better.

trans_ch_5_start_next_bypass.title: Approach to the terminal (Hidden path)
trans_ch_5_start_next_bypass.narrative: You take the decisive step towards the central terminal, emerging from the ventilation shaft directly onto the bridge. The entire story of your survival has led to this moment.
trans_ch_5_start_next_bypass.thought: My entire chain of decisions led to this.

trans_ch_1_explore_to_workbench.title: Inspection of the workbench
trans_ch_1_explore_to_workbench.narrative: Your eyes catch on the familiar outlines of the instruments. You head towards the workbench, feeling that there is something useful you can do here.

act3_boss_distract_result.title: SUCCESSFUL SABOTICE
act3_boss_distract_result.narrative: You forcefully throw the chemical-soaked candy bar into the far corner of the laboratory. The package hits the bulkhead with a crash. The sharp, sickening smell of synthetics instantly overpowers your smell. The Patriarch turns around sharply, his auditory membranes vibrating. Letting out a guttural roar, the meat tank rushes into the darkness behind the rustling wrapper. The path to the nest is clear.
act3_boss_distract_result.thought: I deceived him. Now you can sneak past.

act5_bridge_showdown_ai.title: TRAP: CLEANING PROTOCOL
act5_bridge_showdown_ai.narrative: You take a step onto the panoramic deck, but the airlock behind you is tightly blocked. The center console screen flashes purple. Twin laser turrets of the security system hum from the ceiling niches. The robotic voice of the frantic onboard AI echoes throughout the compartment: “Attention. An unregistered biological threat has been detected. Cleanup protocol activated."
act5_bridge_showdown_ai.thought: The situation is critical. The bridge's protective shields are down and the turrets are targeting me. You need to act in seconds.

trans_ch_2_hydro_bypass_oil.title: Hatch lubrication
trans_ch_2_hydro_bypass_oil.narrative: You pour thick blue oil generously into the corroded grooves of the cargo hatch. The metal gives in with a grinding sound, revealing a deep technical shaft. In the dark passage below, the outlines of the Power Unit can be discerned.

act2_death_oil.title: 💀 DEATH: CRYOGENIC SIP
act2_death_oil.narrative: Ignoring common sense and the warnings of the on-board computer, you unscrew the cap of the canister and take a deep sip of expired Cryo-Shield oil, hoping to “clean the filters” or quench your thirst. The chemical instantly reacts with warm organic matter. The synthetic liquid crystallizes right in your esophagus, turning your insides into a monolithic piece of fragile chemical ice. The suit detects tissue rupture and cardiac arrest.
act2_death_oil.thought: The biometrics broadcast has been interrupted. Marcus Rein died due to excessive culinary curiosity.

act4_gravity_bait_result.title: THE CLEARED PATH
act4_gravity_bait_result.narrative: You place the candy bar on the floor in a zone of abnormal gravity. Dozens of small parasitic morphs instantly crawl out of the ventilation cracks, attracted by the smell of food. Before they can reach the bait, they fall under the influence of 5G. There is a nasty, wet crunch, and the path ahead is cleared of a living threat. You can begin your climb safely.
act4_gravity_bait_result.thought: Cruel but effective. The way is clear.

act3_death_boss.title: 💀 TORN INTO PIECES
act3_death_boss.narrative: You have no argument against the pure rage of mutation. The blind Patriarch turned out to be faster and more merciless. Your suit is torn like paper, and your consciousness fades away under the crunch of your own bones.

act3_boss_kill.title: 🔥 DEATH OF THE PATRIARCH
act3_boss_kill.narrative: With a deafening roar, a heavy plasma beam cuts through the icy air and burns right through the chitinous shell of the creature. The Patriarch lets out a terrible, choking scream and falls onto the frost-covered floor, leaking a thick blue substance. His paws make a final convulsive movement and fall silent. The path through the cryo-bay is completely clear.
act3_boss_kill.thought: I did it... I destroyed this creature. Now in the elevator shafts from below no one will press in.

act2_corridors_rooms.title: ADJACENT COMPARTMENTS
act2_corridors_rooms.narrative: Doors of leading compartments of the residential sector. Medical post, rest room and locked security office.

trans_ch_1_explore_to_snacks.title: Path to the machine
trans_ch_1_explore_to_snacks.narrative: The flickering neon of a broken machine gun beckons like a beacon in this darkness. You take a few steps towards him, hoping for a miracle.

act5_death_button.title: DEATH: THE RED BUTTON BECOMES
act5_death_button.narrative:
Among the chaos and sparkling panels, you notice an armored compartment in the armrest of the captain's chair. Under the protective glass is a huge, glossy red button with a skull and the inscription “DO NOT PRESS”. 
    Yielding to an irresistible childish curiosity, you break the glass with a crowbar and hit it with your palm as hard as you can. 
    A melancholic AI voice is heard: “Emergency bridge interior annihilation system activated.” The floor under your feet opens up, and you and your chair are thrown straight into outer space, towards the burning atmosphere. But I pressed it!
act5_death_button.thought: ...registration of the fall of a body... acceleration of free fall... space vacuum...

act3_med_bay.title: 🔬 LABORATORY MEDICAL CABINET
act3_med_bay.narrative: You open the surviving first aid panel. Inside, capsules with an army neuro-regenerator glow sterilely. This composition is able to heal deep wounds and neutralize toxins in the blood.
act3_med_bay.thought: An excellent chance to heal wounds and relieve concussion or toxicosis.

act1_death_snack.title: 💀 DEATH: TOXIC SHOCK
act1_death_snack.narrative: Hunger and panic take over. You tear off the visor of your helmet and greedily bite into a candy bar that is over ten years old. It tastes like dry cardboard with a hint of copper. A second later your stomach explodes with hellish pain. Due to the depressurization of the laboratories, the confectionery fats inside the machine became an ideal breeding ground for Omega spores. You fall to your knees as purple bio-threads begin to sprout from your mouth and nose.
act1_death_snack.thought: ...biological death of the carrier... the chip is deactivated...

act2_death_selfie.title: DEATH: CYBER VANITY
act2_death_selfie.narrative: You decide that in the face of the imminent destruction of the station, the world must see your courageous face. You turn on the diagnostic terminal at full power and take a selfie with the flash. The bright light instantly attracts three Jumper Morphs from the ventilation. The last frame turned out blurry.

act1_escape_injured.title: BREAKTHROUGH PRICE
act1_escape_injured.narrative: You squeeze through the narrow gap with all your might. A wild grinding sound is heard - the sharp edge of the skin easily rips through the composite fabric of your spacesuit and cuts deep into your thigh. Clutching the wound with your hand, you fall out into the next sector. Blood oozes from the hole.
act1_escape_injured.thought: Crap! Hurt! The status on the suit panel is OPEN BLEEDING. We urgently need to find a medical center.

act1_hub_workbench.title: ENGINEERING WORKBENCH
act1_hub_workbench.narrative: Improvised table with tools and parts. Here you can repair your equipment or prepare a workaround.
act1_hub_workbench.thought: A great place to apply your technical skills.

act2_med_point.title: EMERGENCY MEDICAL STATION B-12
act2_med_point.narrative: The wall-mounted medical unit survived. You break the protective plastic and activate the automatic applicator. A robotic needle injects coagulants and seals the damaged layer of your suit with a thermal patch.
act2_med_point.thought: The bleeding has stopped. Much better. Now you can move on.

act2_recreation_room.title: Abandoned comfort
act2_recreation_room.narrative: You enter the former crew leisure center. Plastic cups are scattered everywhere, poker tables are overturned, and a panoramic virtual screen flickers with broken pixels, simulating an old Earth forest. A technical support service cabinet is open in the corner. Drops of thick, blue-fluorescent oil flowed from the broken canister onto the floor. The label is barely legible: “Cryo-Shield.” The expiration date expired before you arrived at the station.
act2_recreation_room.thought: It smells like old plastic and chemicals. This oil can probably be used as a lubricant. The main thing is not to ingest it.

act2_hydroponics.title: CARNIVOROUS GARDEN
act2_hydroponics.narrative: The hermetic door gives in with a creak, and the damp, suffocating smell of rot and blooming spores hits you in the face. Due to the leakage of bio-mutagen, ordinary hydroponic trays turned into nightmarish thickets. Giant pulsating vines entwined the metal floor beams, and caustic sap dripped from the stems. At the very end of the bio-zone, behind a tangle of vines, you see a massive jammed cargo hatch leading vertically down.
act2_hydroponics.thought: These plants react to the heat of the spacesuit and move barely noticeably. It won't be easy to get through here, but this jammed hatch clearly leads somewhere bypassing the main decks.

act2_tobias_leave.title: SINGLE ROUTE
act2_tobias_leave.narrative: You leave Tobias in the radio room, locking the security door behind you at his request. Your speed is maximum, but the cats are scratching your soul. You go out to the elevator of the bio-complex.
act2_tobias_leave.thought: I must survive at all costs. The station is losing altitude.

act2_death_time_paradox.title: CONTINUUM ERROR
act2_death_time_paradox.narrative: You tried to use the Chronometer too late, when reality had already collapsed. Time is in a loop. You are doomed to relive the last second of your life forever.
act2_death_time_paradox.thought: You shouldn't play with technologies whose nature you don't know.

act2_start.title: QUARTER B-12
act2_start.narrative: You find yourself in the residential sector. Life should be in full swing here, but the corridors are littered with abandoned things. Strange dark veins of organic origin stretch along the walls. They pulsate barely noticeably.
act2_start.thought: The atmosphere is oppressive. The station is falling, I feel a slight vibration of the floor.

act1_secret_shuttle.title: ABANDONED SHUTTLE CELUS
act1_secret_shuttle.narrative: At the far end of the Waste Deck, behind blocked waterproofing, is an old Celsus-class rescue shuttle. The power systems are turned off, but the body is intact. You can escape here if you can find a way to power the engines.
act1_secret_shuttle.thought: This ship is your chance to leave the station without getting caught up in the madness of the upper decks.

act2_corridors.title: RESIDENTIAL SECTOR HUB
act2_corridors.narrative: Central deck intersection. To the left is an emergency rescue post, straight ahead are the doors of the radio room, from where intermittent wheezing can be heard over the intercom.
act2_corridors.thought: It seems there is someone in the radio room. But if I'm bleeding, I should go to the medical station first.

act2_corridors_search.title: SEARCH THE CORRIDOR
act2_corridors_search.narrative: The floor is littered with scraps of papers, personal belongings and strange junk.
act2_corridors_search.thought: Maybe there is something useful here?

act3_core_terminal.title: MUTATION DATABASE
act3_core_terminal.narrative: You hack into the terminal against the wall. Classified files pop up on the screen. It turns out that Marcus Rein is not just a liquidator. A bio-chip for communicating with the Swarm is implanted in your skull. Your memory was erased so that you would not understand that you are the main weapon of the corporation.
act3_core_terminal.thought: Am I... a test subject? Is my whole life a lie? Is there a chip in my head that controls these creatures?!

act3_hub.title: CENTRAL HUB OF THE LABORATORY
act3_hub.narrative: You break through to the central hub of the complex. The orange light of emergency lamps illuminates the surviving medical cabinet B-13 and the fortified hermetic bunker, on which the inscription is lit: “The manager’s office. Dr. E. Hart."
act3_hub.thought: We need to look around. The med cabinet can save a life if I'm injured.

act1_hub_explore.title: HUB RESEARCH
act1_hub_explore.narrative: You inspect the accessible areas of the Landfill Hub. Ahead you can see heaps of scrap metal, a broken vending machine with candy bars and an improvised engineering workbench.

act1_hub_snacks.title: BROKEN MACHINE
act1_hub_snacks.narrative: Old corporate snack dispenser. The glass is broken, revealing the only surviving candy bar inside.
act1_hub_snacks.thought: It looks doubtful, but hunger is not a problem.

act2_bypass_tunnel.title: BYPASS ROUTE
act2_bypass_tunnel.narrative: You use the Heavy Plasma Cutter to burn through the jammed seal of the SB ventilation shaft. The suit's sensors record: this technical tunnel leads bypassing the Bio-Labs and the Reactor Compartment directly to the emergency lines of the Command Bridge! However, life support systems are turned off here.
act2_bypass_tunnel.thought: Passing here will allow me to save time and avoid meeting Doctor Hart, but I will be left without Isolate.

act1_trap.title: JAMMED LEAF
act1_trap.narrative: The lock mechanism was tightly jammed by a bent steel beam. Automation is disabled. The pneumatic drive hisses, the sash is opened only thirty centimeters. Behind it is a dark corridor leading to the living decks.
act1_trap.thought: I can try to squeeze through, but the edges of the torn metal look damn sharp.

trans_ch_1_find_magnetometer.title: Magnetometer Search
trans_ch_1_find_magnetometer.narrative: Among the wreckage of the navigation boards you find a working Calibrated Magnetometer. This is a specific thing, but it can be useful in the reactor compartment.

act2_tobias_hub.title: WOUNDED TOBIAS
act2_tobias_hub.narrative: Security Officer Tobias sits on the floor next to a broken communications console. His leg is torn off, he clamped the stump with a cable. “Marcus...” he croaks. — The station was blocked by AI. He went crazy from the virus. Dr. Hart... she's in the bio-labs. She has a quantum master key. Take him... I’m not a tenant, don’t drag me.”
act2_tobias_hub.thought: Tough choice. Leave him here to die or try to drag him to the bio-laboratories?

act3_cryo_hub.title: CRYOGENIC COMPARTMENT: AMBUSH
act3_cryo_hub.narrative: You enter the cryo storage room. The rows of capsules are covered with a thick layer of frost. Suddenly the light flickers and goes out. Automatic locks the doors behind you. In the deathly silence, a heavy, wet grinding of claws is heard from above. It's coming down.
act3_cryo_hub.thought: Damn, it trapped me here. It senses my presence.

act3_boss_pat.title: 👹 BLIND PATRIARCH
act3_boss_pat.narrative: In front of you, a massive three-meter figure of the Patriarch loomed out of the darkness. His body is covered with chitinous growths, and instead of eyes there is solid bone armor. Its auditory membranes pulsate, picking up the slightest vibrations in the air. One wrong move and this meat tank will tear you apart.
act3_boss_pat.thought: Don't breathe. If I bleed, I'm done...

act3_hart_lab.title: DOCTOR HART'S OFFICE
act3_hart_lab.narrative: The armored intercom screen comes to life. The cold face of Elizabeth Hart looks at you. “Marcus... or should I call you Omega? I know why you are here. You need a quantum carrier to escape. I'll give it away. But first, you go down to the bio-reactor and bring me the Omega Isolate. I need a pure strain of the virus."
act3_hart_lab.thought: She knows my code name. And she’s clearly not saying something about this antidote.

act3_nest_quest.title: REACTOR SOCKET
act3_nest_quest.narrative: You go down to the lower tier. Here is the heart of the disaster. The walls are completely covered with living, moving flesh. In the center, inside a dilapidated glass flask, a violet isotope glows - Omega Isolate. Hundreds of small larvae swarm around.
act3_nest_quest.thought: Get to the console or tear out the flask by force? You need to act quickly, the biomass reacts to the heat of the spacesuit.

act3_has_isolate.title: CHOICE OF DESTINY: ISOLATE IN HANDS
act3_has_isolate.narrative: You return to the hub, holding a container of Omega Isolate. Suddenly, your HUD reveals a hidden log: this strain is not a cure, but the key to the complete subjugation of the Morphs. And the same strain can burn out the corporate chip in your head, returning your memory, but depriving you of communication with the station.
act3_has_isolate.thought: What to do? Give it to her? Enter yourself? Or destroy everything here to hell by releasing the virus into the ventilation?

act1_hub.title: LANDFILL HUB
act1_hub.narrative: After getting out of the starting cell, you find yourself on the Waste Deck. There are piles of deformed scrap, broken drones and containers all around. The only exit from the compartment is blocked by a massive hydraulic airlock flap. A service terminal glows faintly on the wall.
act1_hub.thought: We need to find a way to open these doors before the sector loses its pressure completely.

act1_start.title: AWAKENING IN THE DARKNESS
act1_start.narrative: You come to your senses on the icy metal floor. It's dark all around and smells of ozone and burnt wiring. Emergency responder Marcus Raine's suit wheezes as it activates backup life support systems. The dim light of the waste dump flashes overhead. The on-board computer issues a critical warning: the Nemesis orbital station has left orbit and is falling into the planet’s atmosphere. Time has passed.
act1_start.thought: What happened? My head is pounding, and the suit’s sensors show that the sector is completely de-energized.

act2_tobias_save.title: HEAVY BURDEN
act2_tobias_save.narrative: You lift the wounded Tobias onto your shoulders. He groans in pain, his weight greatly slows down your movements, and the suit’s sensors warn of increased energy consumption on the hydraulics of your legs. Together you get to the elevator of the bio-complex.
act2_tobias_save.thought: We'll get out of here together, chumba. Hold on.

act3_ai_core.title: RESTART PROTOCOL
act3_ai_core.narrative: You enter the shielded server room. The AI ​​"ARGUS" interface flashes crimson: "A bio-chip carrier has been detected. Dr. Hart has initiated a protocol for disposing of your profile. Would you like to use the Director's PDA to authorize the counter-protocol?"
act3_ai_core.thought: If I trust the AI, it can help me lock down Hart Labs remotely.

act3_death_oil.title: DEATH: STOMACH LUBRICANT
act3_death_oil.narrative: In a panic before the Patriarch, you decide to drink Cryo-Shield Synthetic Oil, hoping that your insides will be covered with a protective film against mutations. The oil instantly solidifies in your esophagus, turning your lungs into a monolithic piece of blue plastic.

act1_hub_junk.title: LOTS OF SCRAP METAL
act1_hub_junk.narrative: Piles of deformed scrap, broken drones and containers. You can find useful details here if you dig hard enough.
act1_hub_junk.thought: You need to be careful, the edges of the casing are sharp.

act1_skills.title: NEURAL NETWORK CALIBRATION
act1_skills.narrative: The suit computer requires confirmation of the specialization profile to distribute the remaining battery energy. Your choices will determine what skills are available as you fight for survival on board.
act1_skills.thought: You need to choose quickly. Life support systems won't wait.

act2_escape_capsule.title: PLAN B: DIRECT EVACUATION
act2_escape_capsule.narrative: The cargo container is depressurized, but its manual accelerators are operational. Having a plasma cutter, you can weld the internal hatch tightly, shoot off the fastenings and throw yourself into outer space, completely ignoring the reactor and the command bridge. This is a one-way ticket with no guarantee of salvation.
act2_escape_capsule.thought: The risk of dying from suffocation in the void is enormous, but it’s better than becoming food for the Swarm.

act2_death_blood.title: DEATH: A TRAIL OF BLOOD
act2_death_blood.narrative: You've ignored open bleeding for too long. The smell and warmth of your blood left a clear trail along the entire corridor. While you were talking to Tobias, a flock of hungry morph larvae burst out of the ventilation. You fell next to him.
act2_death_blood.thought: Consciousness fades from blood loss and bites...

act1_cargo_subdeck.title: ROUGHING SUB-TIER
act1_cargo_subdeck.narrative: Having gone down the dilapidated technical stairs, you find yourself on the lower technological platform. The floor underfoot trembles noticeably - the station begins to rub against the upper layers of the atmosphere. A disabled service drone-loader stood frozen against the wall, its hydraulic components covered with a layer of machine oil. A little further you can see the massive, tightly welded gates of the old freight elevator, above which the inscription is lit: DIRECT ACCESS TO THE POWER UNIT.
act1_cargo_subdeck.thought: This elevator bypasses the living quarters and laboratories. But to open these gates, you need a serious tool and an understanding of mechanics.

act1_death_fast.title: DEATH: MORPH JUMPER
act1_death_fast.narrative: The impact of a heavy crowbar on metal echoed throughout the entire ventilation system of the compartment. A pale, multi-legged creature with blade-like jaws silently fell from the darkness of the ceiling. You didn't even have time to scream.
act1_death_fast.thought: ...the pulse line is straight... the broadcast is cut off...

act3_death_hug.title: DEATH: BLIND MERCY
act3_death_hug.narrative: Under the capsule of suspended animation you notice a small, squeaking Morph larva. She looks so defenseless and sweet. You stretch out your hands to it to stroke it and warm it, but the little one, with the force of a hydraulic press, breaks through the glass of your helmet with its acidic sting.
act3_death_hug.thought: ...depressurization of the helmet... toxic liquefaction of the brain...

trans_ch_1_hub_eat_snack.title: Eating a candy bar
trans_ch_1_hub_eat_snack.narrative: Hunger takes over common sense. You open the helmet flap and pop the candy bar into your mouth...
trans_ch_1_hub_eat_snack.thought: I hope this wasn't a fatal mistake...

trans_ch_1_hub_loot_crowbar.title: Search for scrap
trans_ch_1_hub_loot_crowbar.narrative: You scatter the fragments of the casing and pull out a heavy steel scrap. A true classic of emergency survival.

trans_ch_1_hub_take_servo.title: Servo pickup
trans_ch_1_hub_take_servo.narrative: You pick up a heavy industrial servo. It may be possible to repair it or use it to strengthen the hydraulics.

trans_ch_1_hub_take_snack.title: Removing the candy bar
trans_ch_1_hub_take_snack.narrative: You pick an ancient corporate candy bar out of the tray. Looks dubious, but might be useful.

trans_ch_1_hub_to_cargo.title: Descent to the subtier
trans_ch_1_hub_to_cargo.narrative: The metal steps creak under your weight. You descend into the oil-smelling abyss of the lower level.
trans_ch_1_hub_to_cargo.thought: I hope there is another way out below.

trans_ch_1_hub_to_explore.title: Start of research
trans_ch_1_hub_to_explore.narrative: You decide to carefully search the accessible areas of the Landfill Hub, dividing your attention between the rubble, the machine gun and the workbench.
trans_ch_1_hub_to_explore.thought: The devil is in the details.

trans_ch_1_cargo_shortcut.title: [MASTER CUT] Opening the elevator gate
trans_ch_1_cargo_shortcut.narrative: You use the Heavy Crowbar as leverage and your engineering knowledge allows you to short out the backup starter. With a terrible grinding sound, the doors part, revealing the dark mouth of the elevator shaft.
trans_ch_1_cargo_shortcut.thought: Great maneuver. Saving time is everything.

trans_ch_1_loot_servo.title: Removing the servo drive
trans_ch_1_loot_servo.narrative: Using your technical knowledge, you restore hydraulic servo valves in a minute. This heavy bundle is now in your inventory.

ending_6.title: 🏆 ENDING: SAVIOR OF NEMESIS
ending_6.narrative: The maneuvering engines roared, shaking the hull. A powerful G-force push throws you onto the dashboard, but the green status lights up on the screens: TRAJECTORY IS STATIC. The Nemesis station stopped falling and froze in a safe circular orbit. Planetary catastrophe averted. The survivors in the habitation blocks are rescued, and the Swarm is sealed in the vacuum of isolated sectors.
ending_6.thought: I did it... The station is saved. The corporation will have to send rescuers, and this time we will have our own conditions.

ending_8.title: 🏆 ENDING #8: MORPH LORD
ending_8.narrative:
You plug the Roy Provider into the jack on the back of your head. The cybernetic exo-link flashes neon purple, synchronizing with the hidden bio-chip in your head. Consciousness instantly explodes with terabytes of alien sensory data. You are no longer trapped in a piece of composite suit armor.

You feel every creature aboard the Nemesis. You see the corridors through the eyes of jumping Morphs, feel the warmth of other people's bodies through the chitinous membranes of the larvae. Roy, who was trying to tear you apart a second ago, freezes. There is no more blind rage in their collective mind - now your voice is heard there. Your order.

Using mental control, you force hundreds of creatures to climb into the technical compartments and jam the deformed bulkheads and plasma circuits with their bodies. The station's fall is slowing down. You calmly walk past the bio-monsters frozen in bow to the Vanguard rescue shuttle. But it’s not the Quantum Carrier you’re taking with you. You take with you an army ready for expansion. The corporation thought it had created a weapon. They were wrong. They created their new God.
ending_8.thought: I am no longer a tool in their hands. I am the mind that will lead the Swarm forward. Let the corporation try to stop me.

act5_terminal_final.title: PROTOCOLS OF DESTINY ACTIVATED
act5_terminal_final.narrative: The bridge security system is completely broken. The interface of the station's main terminal opens in front of you. The screen is flooded with system logs, access codes and evacuation options. Behind the panoramic glass, the planet already occupies the entire horizon - the station begins to burn in the upper layers of the atmosphere. The Vanguard rescue shuttle is warming up its engines in the dock on the right. Time to make the final choice.
act5_terminal_final.thought: My entire chain of decisions led to this moment. There is no turning back. Which protocol to run?

act4_cryo_stasis.title: DEEP ANBIOSIS
act4_cryo_stasis.narrative: You decide to stop the crazy race against time. The station is already burning in the atmosphere. You lie down in a high-strength engineering cryo-pod, batten down the hatch and activate the emergency tissue preservation mode. The capsule is designed to withstand a planetary impact, but awakening is not guaranteed.
act4_cryo_stasis.thought: Let the station fall. The capsule will protect me... or become my coffin.

ending_1.title: 🏆 ENDING: GHOST OF THE VANGUARD
ending_1.narrative: You successfully stabilized the reactor, preserved human intelligence, and gave up Isolate Hart for the Quantum Carrier. The shuttle undocks from the collapsing station seconds before it explodes. You are flying to the planet, holding corporation data in your hands. You survived, but remained the faithful dog of those who erased your memory.
ending_1.thought: I fulfilled the contract. But who am I now?

ending_5.title: 🏆 ENDING: FORTUNE'S SMILE (SECRET)
ending_5.narrative: Relying solely on incredible luck (LUCK skill), you managed to slip through all the traps without engaging in battle with the Patriarch and ignoring the demands of Dr. Heart. The shuttle's automated capsule was shot off due to an accidental wiring failure just before the bridge fell. The data is lost, the station is destroyed, but you're adrift in an escape capsule with a bottle of synthetic whiskey. Rescuers will find you. Absolutely blank slate.
ending_5.thought: I can't believe it worked. I'm damn lucky.

act4_engine_deck.title: 🚀 MANEUVERING COMPARTMENT SOUTH-OBERON
act4_engine_deck.narrative: You're breaking through to the Engine Deck. There is weightlessness and a hellish roar here: the giant pistons of the maneuvering boosters are jammed due to the deformation of the hull. Jets of superheated hydrazine shoot through the technical bridges. The control systems are burned out, but if the ignition is manually started directly from the combustion chamber, the braking pulses will lift the Nemesis back into a stable orbit.
act4_engine_deck.thought: To manually reset the circuits, I would have to bypass the AI ​​security protocols or use something that would burn out the lock.

act5_bridge_showdown.title: TRAP AT THE END OF THE WORLD
act5_bridge_showdown.narrative: You take a step onto the panoramic deck, but the airlock behind you is tightly blocked. The center console screen flashes purple. Twin laser turrets of the security system hum from the ceiling niches. Suddenly, the cold, static-distorted voice of Doctor Heart comes through the speakers: “You thought I’d release the corporation’s weapons on the shuttle, Marcus? Burn it out."
act5_bridge_showdown.thought: The situation is critical. The bridge's protective shields are down and the turrets are targeting me. You need to act in seconds.

ch_5_bridge_omega_detection.label: ⚠️ [🚨 CRITICAL SYSTEM ERROR] Approach the main bridge terminal
ch_5_bridge_omega_detection.narrative_override: The bridge's security scanners instantly flash crimson. The AI's robotic voice echoes through the compartment: "Attention. Omega spores have been detected in the subject's body. Cleanup protocol has been activated." Ceiling turrets turn towards you before you can say anything...

ch_1_trap_force_injured.label: 🏃 Try to squeeze through without tools

ch_2_launch_capsule.label: 🚀 Pull the manual reset lever and weld the hatch
ch_2_launch_capsule.narrative_override: The lever gives in with a terrible grinding noise. The automation shoots the container into the icy abyss. You are free.

ch_1_escape_injured_next.label: 👣Patch the wound and enter the Residential Blocks

ch_1_lore_back.label: ↩️ Return to the scrap metal rubble

ch_2_leave_to_act3.label: 🚀 Take the elevator down to the Bio-Laboratory

ch_4_cryo_absurd.label: 👅 Lick the icy wall of the cryogenic tank
ch_4_cryo_absurd.narrative_override: You decide to check whether the temperature of liquid nitrogen is really that low. Your tongue instantly freezes tightly to the metal. While trying to free yourself, you accidentally pull the emergency pressure valve. A jet of liquid nitrogen instantly turns Marcus into an ice statue, which crashes into fragments.

ch_1_cargo_sealed_container_back.label: ↩️ Take the battery and go out

ch_5_b_ending_5.label: 🏆 [SECRET] Trust blind luck at the last moment

ch_5_b_ending_8.label: 🧬 [EXO-LINK] Use the Swarm Provider and subdue the Morph hivemind
ch_5_b_ending_8.narrative_override: You activate the exo interface. A powerful electrical discharge passes through the body, but instead of pain comes absolute, cold control over every biological unit on the station.

ch_5_showdown_crowbar.label: 🔧 [ITEM] Insert a Heavy Crowbar into the turret servo

trans_choice_ch_5_showdown_battery.label: ➡️ Rush to the terminal under the cover of the shield

ch_1_trap_eng_clean.label: 🔧 [TECHNIQUE] Use a laser cutter to carefully dismantle the beam
ch_1_trap_eng_clean.narrative_override: You expertly cut off the stubborn beam. The airlock doors hiss apart, opening a clear path out.

ch_1_trap_luck_clean.label: 🎲 [LUCK] Press a random key combination on the service panel
ch_1_trap_luck_clean.narrative_override: Incredibly, the relay shorted exactly as it should! The lock clicked and completely cleared the passage.

ch_4_reactor_overload.label: 💥 Overload the reactor circuits for a powerful EMP pulse against the creatures

ch_1_hub_to_shuttle.label: 🔍 [SECRET] Search the far corner behind the blocked waterproofing
ch_1_hub_to_shuttle.narrative_override: You notice a barely visible seam in the trim. Behind it is an old rescue shuttle.

ch_1_shuttle_back.label: ↩️ Systems are dead. Return to Landfill Hub
ch_1_shuttle_back.narrative_override: There is no power, the engines do not respond. We'll have to look for another way.

ch_4_start_to_vault.label: ❄️ [SECRET] Stumble upon the hidden panel of the Secret Cryo Archive
ch_4_start_to_vault.narrative_override: Among the chaos of destruction, you find an untouched deep-freeze compartment.

ch_3_reactor_escape_to_bridge.label: 🏃 Break through the emergency ventilation airlock to the Command Bridge
ch_3_reactor_escape_to_bridge.narrative_override: Choking from smoke and radiation, you get out of the reactor sector straight to the final line.

ch_4_vault_to_ending.label: 💤 Lie down in the capsule and start the survival protocol
