ch_4_vault_to_ending.narrative_override: Let the station fall. The capsule will protect me... or become my coffin.

ch_3_ai_to_act4.label: 🚀 The AI ​​obeyed. Heading to the Energy Block
ch_3_ai_to_act4.narrative_override: The drones delivered Isolate directly to the airlock. Hart Labs is on lockdown. I can move on.

ch_2_secret_take_cutter.label: 🔫 Take the Heavy Plasma Cutter
ch_2_secret_take_cutter.narrative_override: You attach a heavy weapon to the suit's magnetic grip. It's heavy and clumsy, but its power is enough to burn through even tank armor.

ch_2_hydro_to_bypass.label: 🔥 [ITEM] Use Heavy Plasma Cutter on the jammed cargo hatch
ch_2_hydro_to_bypass.narrative_override: You burn through the hatch and jump into the shaft, completely bypassing the laboratories and the reactor!

ch_3_hub_to_ai.label: 💻 [SECRET] Try to hack the central AI Core "ARGUS"
ch_3_hub_to_ai.narrative_override: If I have Director access, I can force the AI ​​to lock down Hart Labs.

ch_2_secret_office_back.label: ↩️ Return to the corridors of the residential sector
ch_2_secret_office_back.narrative_override: You take everything valuable and leave the office, returning to the intersection.

ch_3_hart_exploit.label: 💻 [MOD] Use the Director's PDA to remotely intercept the Isolate
ch_3_hart_exploit.narrative_override: You connect the Director's PDA to the intercom terminal. Hart's face pales as the automatic gateway security system obeys your command. Technical drones, bypassing her will, extract Isolate Omega from the depths of the reactor and deliver it to the airlock right at your feet. You didn't have to go down into the nest!

ch_5_showdown_battery.label: ⚡ [ITEM] Use Spare Battery for Shield Pulse

ch_4_engines_isolate_exploit.label: ☣️ [BIO-MECHANICS] Pour Omega Isolate into the bio-sensors of stuck valves
ch_4_engines_isolate_exploit.narrative_override: Crazy idea! You break the ampoule with Isolate directly into the hydraulic receiver. The aggressive mutagen instantly reacts with traces of the Swarm's organics, causing the jammed bio-growths on the pistons to convulsively contract and release the metal. The valves open, releasing the plasma accelerators!

ch_1_cargo_back.label: ↩️ Climb back to the Landfill Hub
ch_1_cargo_back.narrative_override: You decide not to take any chances with the old elevator and return to the main deck.

ch_5_terminal_chrono_fix.label: 🔧 [SECRET] Use Stationery Clips to fix the Chronometer and freeze time
ch_5_terminal_chrono_fix.narrative_override: You deftly connect the broken internal contacts of the case with ordinary office clips. The chronometer makes a shrill ringing sound. Time around freezes for ten endless seconds. This is enough to seal the cryo-capsule hatch and wait out the impact.

ch_2_rec_take_oil.label: 🧴Search the closet and take away a heavy canister of Cryo-Shield oil
ch_2_rec_take_oil.narrative_override: You carefully pour the remaining thick blue oil into an airtight container on the suit's belt. Now you have an excellent technical lubricant.

ch_4_engines_pda_win.label: 💾 [HACK/HACK] Use the Director's PDA to forcefully reset the engine lock
ch_4_engines_pda_win.narrative_override: You connect a secure PDA to the main injector. The Director's master key instantly shuts up the station's crazy AI. The automation unlocks the servos, the heavy pistons slide into place, and the engines begin the braking cycle as normal. You're safe.

ch_4_engines_manual_burn.label: ⚡ [DANGER] Close the ignition relay manually through the exposed power cable
ch_4_engines_manual_burn.narrative_override: You don't have access keys. You tear off the protective casing and grab with your hands the cables under voltage of thousands of volts. A terrible electric shock throws you to the floor, burning out the internal systems of the suit and damaging the nervous system, but the spark reaches the injectors - the engines start!

ch_2_get_clips.label: 📎Search the abandoned reception desk
ch_2_get_clips.narrative_override: Among the pile of papers you find a pack of durable steel office clips. Why do you need them? Who knows.

ch_2_bypass_to_bridge.label: 👣 Move along the de-energized tunnel up to the Command Bridge

ch_3_nest_hug_monster.label: 🥺 Try to pet the cute little mutant larva on the wall
ch_3_nest_hug_monster.narrative_override: She moves her mustache so funny! She's probably just scared in this dark nest...

ch_4_to_cryo_stasis.label: ❄️ Use the Faraday Key Card for the capsule terminal and go into suspended animation
ch_4_to_cryo_stasis.narrative_override: Secure access codes put the capsule into autonomous disaster survival mode. Systems isolate you from the outside world.

ch_cryo_end_trigger.label: 💤 Close your eyes and start freezing

ch_1_hub_to_cargo.label: ⚡ Go down the stairs
ch_1_hub_to_cargo.narrative_override: The metal steps creak under your weight. You descend into the oil-smelling abyss of the lower level.

ch_1_cargo_loot_servo.label: 🔧 Dismantle a broken android for parts
ch_1_cargo_loot_servo.narrative_override: Using the suit's basic tools, you carefully open the robot's knee joint and remove the Broken Servo. Heavy, but valuable.

ch_2_tobias_feed_bar.label: 🍫 [ITEM] Give Tobias the Meteor Bar
ch_2_tobias_feed_bar.narrative_override: You hand him an ancient, hardened block.

ch_2_tobias_feed_back.label: ↩️ Return to discussion of the plan
ch_2_tobias_feed_back.narrative_override: You give him a break and reassess the situation.

ch_3_boss_distract_bar.label: 🍫 [ITEM] Throw the candy bar in the opposite corner of the laboratory
ch_3_boss_distract_bar.narrative_override: You take out a chemical-soaked candy bar and throw it with all your might at the far end of the hall.

ch_3_boss_distract_to_nest.label: 👣 Slip into the Nest while the monster is busy
ch_3_boss_distract_to_nest.narrative_override: You silently make your way past while the Patriarch tears at the wrapper in the far corner.

ch_4_gravity_bait.label: 🍫 [ITEM] Place a candy bar on the edge of the anomalous zone as bait
ch_4_gravity_bait.narrative_override: You place the candy bar on the floor in a high gravity area.

ch_4_gravity_bait_to_climb.label: 👣 Start climbing the mine safely
ch_4_gravity_bait_to_climb.narrative_override: The threat eliminated, you cling to the first ledge in the shaft.

ch_2_secret_take_pda.label: 💾 Pick up the Director's PDA
ch_2_secret_take_pda.narrative_override: You pick up the heavy tablet. The status appears on the screen: Administrator Master Access. With this you can try to hack the Hart system.

ch_5_b_ending_3_workbench.label: 🎖 [FINAL] Start blackout protocol (Workbench: Living Tobias and Spare Battery)

ch_5_showdown_ref.label: ⚡ [REFLEXES] Make a tactical tackle under laser beams and cut the power cable
ch_5_showdown_ref.narrative_override: Your augmentations and combat experience as a stormtrooper work flawlessly. You fall onto the slippery metal floor, flying under a grid of heat rays. With one precise blow from a heavy tool, you rip out the main power cable from the distribution board by the roots. The bridge plunges into emergency twilight, defense systems go out.

ch_5_showdown_tobias.label: 🤝 [TOBIAS] Order a wounded teammate to cover you with an assault rifle
ch_5_showdown_tobias.narrative_override: Tobias, overcoming the hellish pain from his lost leg, slides off your shoulders and throws up the captured machine gun: “Run to the console, Marcus! I'll take down these damn guns! While he is pouring lead on the turrets, taking retaliatory hits on his body armor, you break through to the terminal.

ch_1_hub_take_snack.label: 🍫 Find a Meteor bar in the broken machine and put it in your pocket
ch_1_hub_take_snack.narrative_override: You pick an ancient corporate candy bar out of the tray. Looks dubious, but might be useful.

ch_1_skip_to_act4.label: 🔧 [TECHNIQUE] Use a Heavy Crowbar to break into a freight elevator shaft directly

ch_5_b_ending_3_bad.label: 🎖 [FINAL] Give the last order to Tobias
ch_5_b_ending_3_bad.narrative_override: You understand that without cover you won't get to the launch pad. Tobias looks at you, already knowing the answer. “Cover me,” you say.

ch_1_repair_servo.label: 🔧 [TECHNIQUE] Repair the servo and integrate it into the exoskeleton of the legs
ch_1_repair_servo.narrative_override: Using engineering tools, you tinker with the servo. The hydraulics of the legs are rumbling quite - the load-carrying capacity of the spacesuit has been significantly increased!

ch_5_showdown_absurd.label: 🔴 Ignore the turrets, jump into the luxurious captain's chair and press the big red button

ch_2_hydro_bypass_oil_back.label: ↩️ Go back
ch_2_hydro_bypass_oil_back.narrative_override: You decide not to risk it and return to the Hydroponics compartment.

ch_5_b_ending_2.label: 🏆 [FINAL] The reactor is overloaded, the chip is destroyed, the data is erased

trans_choice_ch_1_skip_to_act4.label: 🏃 [CUT] Fly down
trans_choice_ch_1_skip_to_act4.narrative_override: You jump onto the rope, flying through the Residential Sector and Laboratories!

ch_2_hydro_back.label: ↩️ Return back to the residential intersection

ch_2_bypass_act3_4.label: 👤 [STEALTH] Use the Ventilation Scheme to directly break through to the Command Bridge
ch_2_bypass_act3_4.narrative_override: The duct map did not disappoint. You climb into a narrow pipe and, bypassing Doctor Hart's bio-laboratories and the exploding reactor, crawl right under the dashboard of the Command Bridge!

ch_1_cargo_shortcut.label: ⚙️ [MASTER CUT] Open the freight elevator gate and jump into the shaft

ch_2_sabotage_escape.label: 🛠️ [SURVIVAL + PLASMA CUTTER] Prepare a cargo container for emergency shooting into space
ch_2_sabotage_escape.narrative_override: You use the Heavy Plasma Cutter to cut the fuses on the airlock, and your survival skills help you calculate the minimum oxygen supply in the container.

ch_2_hydro_bypass_oil.label: 🧴 [ITEM] Use Cryo-Shield oil to open the rusted cargo hatch

ch_1_skip_to_act4_back.label: ↩️ Go back
ch_1_skip_to_act4_back.narrative_override: You decide not to risk it and return to the workbench.

ch_2_loot_chronometer.label: 🕵️ Search the broken clock on the wall of the compartment
ch_2_loot_chronometer.narrative_override: Among the shards of quartz glass you find a strange prototype of a pocket device. It flickers with a soft blue light, defying the laws of physics. You take it away.

ch_1_cargo_shortcut_back.label: ↩️ Go back
ch_1_cargo_shortcut_back.narrative_override: You decide not to risk it and return to the cargo hold.

ch_2_hub_to_hydro.label: 🌿 [COMPARTMENT] Enter the foggy sector of the Hydroponics Greenhouse

ch_2_bypass_to_bridge_back.label: ↩️ Go back
ch_2_bypass_to_bridge_back.narrative_override: You decide not to rush and return to the tunnel.

trans_choice_ch_2_hydro_bypass_oil.label: 🏃 [CUT] Jump into the mine
trans_choice_ch_2_hydro_bypass_oil.narrative_override: You jump down, completely flying past the research laboratories and straight into the Power Unit!

ch_2_security_take_items.label: 📟 Take the Exo-Link and Ventilation Circuit from the table
ch_2_security_take_items.narrative_override: You take the Swarm Provider (Exo-Link) and load the Ventilation Circuit into the PDA. Now you see the entire network of hidden air ducts of the station.

ch_3_boss_fight.label: 🔥 [WEAPON] Use Heavy Plasma Cutter against the Blind Patriarch

ch_2_tobias_leave.label: 🏃 [LEAVE] Lock the radio room and run to the bio-complex elevator

ch_1_explore_to_junk.label: 🗑️ Search the rubble of scrap metal

ch_2_tobias_save.label: 🤝 [SAVE] Put Tobias on your shoulders and move together

ch_3_boss_annihilate.label: 🔥 [WEAPON] Burn the Patriarch with a Heavy Plasma Cutter
ch_3_boss_annihilate.narrative_override: You activate the plasma cutter at full power. The blinding beam burns through the chitin and tissue of the monster. The creature falls dead. From her skull you extract the surviving Quantum Swarm Provider!

ch_3_boss_eng.label: 🔧 [TECHNIQUE] Close the power cables of the capsules to the puddle under the monster's feet

ch_3_boss_ref.label: ⚡ [REFLEXES] Cut off the creature's auditory membranes with a plasma cutter

ch_3_boss_stl.label: 👤 [STEALTH] Silently distract the Patriarch by throwing a metal pipe

ch_3_choice_hart.label: 🤝 Give Isolate to Doctor Hart (Select security and Quantum Carrier)

ch_3_choice_self.label: 🧠 Inject the strain into your brain (Burn out the corporation chip, restore your memory)

ch_3_choice_vent.label: 💨 Break the flask and release the strain into the general ventilation of the sector

ch_3_nest_hck.label: 💻 [HACK/MOD] Carry out a clean software extraction of the strain

ch_3_reactor_escape_clean.label: 👣 Break through the emergency ventilation airlock into the supply mines
ch_3_reactor_escape_clean.narrative_override: Choking from the smoke, you knock out the air duct grate and crawl into the elevator shafts. A dull explosion is heard behind - the reactor sector is isolated forever.

ch_4_climb_power_hydraulics.label: ⚙️ Overload the power drives of the legs and servos of the exoskeleton
ch_4_climb_power_hydraulics.narrative_override: The suit's hydraulics respond with a powerful roar. Your lifting capacity and pushing power are now doubled. An excellent base for carrying heavy loads.

ch_4_climb_power_magnets.label: 🧲 Maximize the power of Magnetic grips on gloves and soles
ch_4_climb_power_magnets.narrative_override: The magnetic relays snap onto the shaft guides with such force that you almost get pinned against the wall. It's almost impossible to get you out of here now.

ch_4_climb_power_shields.label: 🛡️ Direct emergency energy to the suit's Kinetic shields
ch_4_climb_power_shields.narrative_override: You're redirecting power to the baffles. A faint flickering field flashes around the suit. The speed of movement decreases, but you are protected from external blows.

ch_2_save_to_act3.label: 🚀 Drag Tobias into the elevator and go down

ch_3_nest_stl.label: 👤 [STEALTH] Silently squeeze past the sleeping vines of the Swarm
ch_3_nest_stl.narrative_override: Using the suit's hidden modules, you glide smoothly between the pulsating veins. Your movements are quieter than a sigh. You carefully remove the flask with the Isolate without disturbing any of the larvae.

ch_3_nest_srv.label: ☣️ [SURVIVAL] Manually tear out the capsule directly from the bio-mass

ch_4_climb_solo_skip.label: 🏃 Start a high-speed climb alone (Slice)
ch_4_climb_solo_skip.narrative_override: You have passed the central sections of the station. You have no wounded behind you, but there is no place to expect support from. You activate the suit's magnetic grips.

ch_4_climb_universal_fallback.label: 🏃 Use standard spacesuit reserves for ascent
ch_4_climb_universal_fallback.narrative_override: You are not burdened with wounded comrades and heavy equipment from past acts. Your goal is simply to survive and get to the reactor compartment. You start to climb.

ch_5_b_ending_3.label: 🚀 [FINAL] Launch Alliance Protocol (Requires: Living Tobias and Quantum Carrier)

ch_4_regen_use.label: 💉 Activate capsule (Full healing / Station will fall faster)

ch_5_bridge_showdown_ai_recovery.label: ➡️ Retreat and regroup at the airlock

ch_4_reactor_to_engines_srv.label: ☣️ [SURVIVAL] Take a shortcut through the gas-polluted supply sector to the brake installations
ch_4_reactor_to_engines_srv.narrative_override: Tightening the spacesuit straps and ignoring warnings about the toxicity of the fuel, you forcefully break down the hatch and squeeze into the corridors of the maneuvering complex. Your experience tells me that if you activate the engines, the fall will stop.

ch_1_hub_loot_crowbar.label: 🔨 Move away the debris of the casing
ch_1_hub_loot_crowbar.narrative_override: You scatter the fragments of the casing and pull out a heavy steel scrap. A true classic of emergency survival.

ch_1_find_magnetometer.label: 🔍 Approach a pile of electronics
ch_1_find_magnetometer.narrative_override: Among the wreckage of the navigation boards you find a working Calibrated Magnetometer. This is a specific thing, but it can be useful in the reactor compartment.

ch_1_hub_take_servo.label: 🔍 Search the trash in the center of the room
ch_1_hub_take_servo.narrative_override: You pick up a heavy industrial servo. It may be possible to repair it or use it to strengthen the hydraulics.

trans_choice_ch_1_cargo_shortcut.label: 🏃 [CUT] Continue falling in the mine
trans_choice_ch_1_cargo_shortcut.narrative_override: You jump onto a cable flying past and fly down, completely missing the residential decks and laboratories!

ch_1_hub_eat_snack.label: 🤤 Eat a Meteor bar right now to restore your strength
ch_1_hub_eat_snack.narrative_override: Hunger takes over common sense. You open the helmet flap and pop the candy bar into your mouth...

trans_choice_ch_1_hub_loot_crowbar.label: ➡️ Put the crowbar in your inventory

ch_2_corridors_to_start.label: 👣 Step aside and explore Quarter B-12

ch_3_nest_ref.label: ⚡ [REFLEXES] Snatch the flask with a quick jerk and dodge the impact of the spikes
ch_3_nest_ref.narrative_override: Your reaction saves your life. In a split second you grab the flask, and when the biomass suddenly awakens and throws out bone spikes, you do a perfect somersault back, escaping with only fear.

ch_1_hub_eat_snack_back.label: ↩️ Change your mind and fasten your helmet
ch_1_hub_eat_snack_back.narrative_override: Common sense is returning. You fasten the helmet flap without risking your health.

ch_2_tobias_bleed_back.label: ↩️ Urgently pinch the wound and retreat
ch_2_tobias_bleed_back.narrative_override: You understand that the smell of blood attracts creatures. We need to stop the bleeding immediately!

ch_2_rec_drink_oil_back.label: ↩️ Come to your senses and don’t drink chemicals
ch_2_rec_drink_oil_back.narrative_override: Common sense prevails. You close the helmet valve, realizing that this is a technical lubricant, not a drink.

ch_2_do_selfie_back.label: ↩️ Change your mind and move away from the terminal
ch_2_do_selfie_back.narrative_override: You decide not to risk it, remove your hand from the console and take a step back into the corridor. The outbreak never happened.

ch_3_boss_bleed_back.label: ↩️ Urgently pinch the wound and step into the shadows
ch_3_boss_bleed_back.narrative_override: You realize that the smell of blood gives you away. We need to stop the bleeding immediately!

ch_5_bridge_omega_back.label: ↩️ Recoil sharply from the terminal
ch_5_bridge_omega_back.narrative_override: You take a step back, trying to get out of the scanning area before the turrets open fire.

ch_3_nest_hug_back.label: ↩️ Change your mind and not touch the mutant
ch_3_nest_hug_back.narrative_override: You pull your hand back, realizing that this is not a cute pet, but a deadly larva.

ch_1_trap_stl_clean.label: 👤 [STEALTHY] Lubricate the grooves of the sash with oil and silently slip through

ch_4_cryo_absurd_back.label: ↩️ Come to your senses and don’t lick the ice
ch_4_cryo_absurd_back.narrative_override: Common sense returns at the last second. You jerk your head away from the ice wall.

ch_1_hub_to_lore.label: 🔍 Go to the pile of garbage near the wall

ch_3_boss_drink_oil_back.label: ↩️ Change your mind and not drink oil
ch_3_boss_drink_oil_back.narrative_override: Panic recedes. You understand that this will not help against the monster, but will only harm.

ch_1_hub_to_explore.label: 🔍 Go to the waste deck
ch_1_hub_to_explore.narrative_override: You decide to thoroughly search the accessible areas of the Landfill Hub.

ch_3_boss_yolo_back.label: ↩️ Stop and don’t run to certain death
ch_3_boss_yolo_back.narrative_override: The instinct of self-preservation takes over. You slow down, realizing that you cannot survive a frontal attack.

ch_2_hub_to_secret.label: 🔍 [SEARCH] Check the locked door marked SB

ch_2_do_selfie.label: 📸 Use the terminal to take a pretentious selfie against the backdrop of a burning corridor
ch_2_do_selfie.narrative_override: You activate the surveillance camera and strike a beautiful pose. Flash!

ch_3_nest_luck.label: 🎲 [LUCK] Rely on chance and grab the flask while the larvae are sleeping
ch_3_nest_luck.narrative_override: You decide to take a risk. While you are reaching for the flask, the reactor systems malfunction, and a couple of flashes of fire scare away the biomass. You manage to snatch the Isolate out without a single scratch!

ch_2_hub_to_med.label: ➕ [MEDICAL POST] Inspect the emergency medical center

ch_2_hub_to_rec.label: 🎮 [COMpartment] Go through the broken glass doors to the Break Room

ch_4_gravity_test_back.label: ↩️ Change your mind and don’t throw away the key
ch_4_gravity_test_back.narrative_override: You catch the key on the fly, realizing that testing the anomalous gravity on yourself is a bad idea.

ch_2_hydro_srv.label: ☣️ [SURVIVAL] Cut a safe corridor through the poisonous thickets to the elevator
ch_2_hydro_srv.narrative_override: Using your innate knowledge of extreme flora, you accurately prune the supporting nodes of mutated vines. They fall powerlessly, freeing up a clear passage to the main elevator.

ch_2_hydro_stl.label: 👤 [STEALTH] Calculate the movement cycles of the stems and sneak through without a fight
ch_2_hydro_stl.narrative_override: You freeze, matching the rhythm of your steps to the slow pulsations of the plants. Your suit slips under the blind vines without touching a single poisonous thorn.

trans_choice_ch_2_bypass_to_bridge.label: 🏃 [CUT] Continue path
trans_choice_ch_2_bypass_to_bridge.narrative_override: You break out the service panel and find yourself right at the end.

ch_2_hub_to_lore.label: 🔍 Examine the papers on the floor

ch_2_lounge_to_security.label: 🔑 Search the reception desk and go to the Security Service Offices

ch_2_start_next.label: 👣 Go to the central intersection of the residential sector

ch_4_to_engine_deck.label: 🚀 [ENGINEER] Break through to the engines and manually change the orbit
ch_4_to_engine_deck.narrative_override: You ignore the reactor and rush towards the engines. Your engineering expertise allows you to redirect the flow of antimatter.

ch_1_loot_servo.label: 🔧 [TECHNIQUE] Remove a broken servo from an engineering drone
ch_1_loot_servo.narrative_override: Using your technical knowledge, you can rebuild hydraulic servo valves in a minute. This Heavy Knot is now in your inventory.

ch_2_rec_drink_oil.label: 🤢 Pour expired oil directly into the helmet intake valve

ch_2_med_back.label: ↩️ Pick up the remaining stimulants and return

ch_4_climb_servo_godmode.label: 🦾 Use Boosted Servo to climb with Tobias
ch_4_climb_servo_godmode.narrative_override: Your suit's modified hydraulics can easily handle the weight of your wounded partner. You confidently and quickly walk up the cables of the mine, ignoring the gravitational blows.

ch_3_boss_kill_to_hub.label: 👣 Step through the smoking remains of a monster in the laboratory

ch_1_junk_complete.label: 🏆 The rubble has been explored to the bottom

ch_3_boss_luck.label: 🎲 [LUCK] Freeze and hope that the creature steps on the exposed power cable
ch_3_boss_luck.narrative_override: Incredible accident! The creature takes a blind step to the side, and its clawed paw lands directly on a sparkling high-voltage cable. A terrible discharge of current throws the Blind Patriarch back into the darkness, giving you precious time to rush to the nest.

ch_3_boss_srv.label: 🌿 [SURVIVAL] Use pheromones from the bio-waste container to mask the smell
ch_3_boss_srv.narrative_override: You quickly break the emergency container and smear the caustic mucus of a dead Swarm specimen all over your suit. The Patriarch moves his blind muzzle just a couple of centimeters from your helmet, noisily inhaling air, but, uttering a guttural roar, he turns around and goes into the ventilation. The path is clear.

ch_2_bypass_back.label: ↩️ Change your mind and return to the Greenhouse
ch_2_bypass_back.narrative_override: You decide that taking a shortcut through a blackout tunnel is too risky without proper preparation. It's better to find another way.

ch_2_capsule_back.label: ↩️ Cancel preparations and return to the Greenhouse
ch_2_capsule_back.narrative_override: You've changed your mind about risking your life in outer space. It's a one-way ticket, and you're not ready to use it yet.

ch_4_cryo_stasis_back.label: ↩️ Exit the capsule and continue to the reactor
ch_4_cryo_stasis_back.narrative_override: You changed your mind about giving up. The station hasn't fallen yet, you have a chance to fix everything with your own hands.

ch_3_hart_accept.label: ☣️ Accept the terms. Go down to the Reactor Nest for Isolate

ch_3_hub_to_med.label: 🔬 Go to the laboratory medical cabinet

ch_5_start_next_bypass.label: 👣 Go to the main control terminal

ch_4_climb_magnetometer.label: 🧲 Use a Calibrated Magnetometer to safely navigate to the engines
ch_4_climb_magnetometer.narrative_override: The device clearly registers field fluctuations. You calculate a completely safe corridor and proceed to the engine controls without any skill checks.

ch_2_rec_to_corridors.label: 🚪 Go out to the common corridors of the cabins

ch_5_b_ending_4.label: 🏆 [FINAL] Your body is completely destroyed by toxins and the Omega virus

ch_4_phase2_fall_tobias.label: 🚨 [CATastrophe] Trying to hold Tobias without strengthening the drives...
ch_4_phase2_fall_tobias.narrative_override: The overload becomes unbearable. Without additional power in the hydraulics or passive servos, your knees break with a terrible sound. Under the wild cry of your partner, you both fall into the abyss.

ch_4_phase2_hydraulics_win.label: ⚙️ [HYDRAULICS] Get the most out of the exoskeleton and pull out the wounded
ch_4_phase2_hydraulics_win.narrative_override: The suit's motors howl heart-rendingly, the indicators glow crimson, but the powerful leg drives can withstand Tobias' monstrous mass. With a powerful jerk, you throw yourself and your partner onto the hard floor of the reactor hall.

ch_4_gravity_test.label: 🔨 Throw a heavy key up to check for abnormal gravity

ch_4_phase2_luck_win.label: 🎲 [LUCK] Hoping that the broken elevator cable will jam and create a support
ch_4_phase2_luck_win.narrative_override: Incredible! The whipped steel cable wraps around the torn beam right under your feet, forming a temporary bridge. You quickly step over the dangerous area.

ch_4_phase2_magboots_win.label: 🧲 [MAGNETS / BOOTS] Fix tightly on the vibrating wall
ch_4_phase2_magboots_win.narrative_override: Whether it's the activated energy of magnets or your engineered Magnetic Boots, the soles are tightly welded to the rail. You don't care about the gravity shift. After calmly waiting out the vibration, you reach the top.

ch_5_b_ending_1.label: 🏆 [FINAL] The reactor is stable, you have Quantum Carrier Heart in your hands

ch_4_phase2_solo_clean.label: 👣 Catch onto the lifeline and make the final push
ch_4_phase2_solo_clean.narrative_override: Since you are traveling light and not burdened by a wounded officer, your basic strength is enough to ignore the tilt of the station and deftly climb into the open reactor airlock.

ch_4_start_to_climb.label: 👣 Start climbing the vertical elevator shaft

ch_4_start_to_regen.label: 🔧 Enter the technical compartment with the cryo-capsule

ch_4_reactor_to_engines_eng.label: 🛠 [TECHNIQUE] Redirect plasma flows directly to the shunting nozzles of the engine deck
ch_4_reactor_to_engines_eng.narrative_override: You're reconfiguring the distribution network. The HUD navigates the route through the emergency sewer to the southern boosters. There is still a chance to save the station itself!

ch_4_reactor_stabilize.label: 🔧 [TECHNIQUE] Direct all reserves to stabilize the magnetic field of the core

ch_5_start_next.label: 👣 Go to the main control terminal

ch_5_showdown_hack.label: 💻 [MOD] Use the Director's PDA to remotely disable the defense protocol
ch_5_showdown_hack.narrative_override: You promptly connect the Director's secure PDA, found in Act 2, to the service port of the gateway. Corporate Master Codes instantly take over priority. The laser turrets turn off with a squeal and retract back into their slots. The path to the main terminal is clear.

ch_5_showdown_yolo.label: 🏃 Try to break through to the terminal under heavy fire
ch_5_showdown_yolo.narrative_override: You don't have the right tools or tactical advantage. You just run forward through open space. The turret laser markers instantly converge on your chest. A volley of plasma burns right through your suit, throwing your lifeless body back into the shaft.

ach_speedrun.title: Rapid fire
ach_speedrun.description: Die in the first 2 minutes of the game by causing a rumble in the Landfill Hub.

ach_say_cheese.title: Smile!
ach_say_cheese.description: Attempt to take a selfie through the security terminal during a Morph breach.

ach_mother_teresa.title: Mother Teresa
ach_mother_teresa.description: Try to hug and feel sorry for the cute larva of a foreign organism.

ach_newton_approves.title: Newton approves
ach_newton_approves.description: Throw a wrench upward in an area of ​​abnormally high gravity.

ach_red_button.title: What is she doing?
ach_red_button.description: Press the huge, inviting red button on the Command Bridge just before the finale.

ach_smuggler_route.title: Smuggler
ach_smuggler_route.description: Hack the cargo sub-tier in Act 1 and take the shortcut directly to Act 4.

ach_vent_rat.title: Ventilation rat
ach_vent_rat.description: Find the hidden SB drawings and climb through the ventilation pipes from Act 2 directly to the Bridge.

ach_david_vs_goliath.title: David vs Goliath
ach_david_vs_goliath.description: Do not run away from the Blind Patriarch, but completely annihilate him with a heavy plasma cutter.

ach_lucky_bastard.title: Smile of Fortune
ach_lucky_bastard.description: Complete the game relying solely on blind luck (Class LUCK).

ach_swarm_lord.title: Morph Lord
ach_swarm_lord.description: Subdue the Swarm Mind using Exo-Link and preserve human sanity.

space_wanderer.title: Space Trucker
space_wanderer.description: Escape the station in a cargo container, completely missing half the game.

chronos_master.title: Time Lord
chronos_master.description: Find and repair the Broken Chronometer prototype in the civilian sector.

infected_mind.title: The Phantom Menace
infected_mind.description: Reach the ending with the hidden phase of Swarm incubation inside your own body.

eternal_passenger.title: Eternal Passenger
eternal_passenger.description: Go into cryo-sleep and survive the fall of the space station.

heavy_mechanic.title: Exo-Engineer
heavy_mechanic.description: Collect and repair the Broken Servo in Act 1, making the passage of the elevator shaft completely easier.

ach_chemical_gourmet.title: Chemical industry gourmand
ach_chemical_gourmet.description: Drink a canister of expired technical oil "Cryo-Shield".

ach_food_poisoning.title: Food poisoning of the century
ach_food_poisoning.description: Eat a 10-year-old Meteor bar from a contaminated vending machine.

ach_boss_death.title: Torn to pieces
ach_boss_death.description: Die in the clutches of the Blind Patriarch, underestimating his rage.

ach_reactor_fall.title: Falling into the reactor
ach_reactor_fall.description: Fall into the reactor shaft, trying to hold Tobias.

ach_time_paradox.title: Time paradox
ach_time_paradox.description: Try to rewind time with a Broken Chronometer and destroy your own mind.

ach_sacrifice_ending.title: Burning of Jericho
ach_sacrifice_ending.description: Sacrifice yourself and the station to destroy the Swarm along with Nemesis.

ach_savior_ending.title: Savior Nemesis
ach_savior_ending.description: Save the station from the Swarm by sacrificing part of yourself.

ach_steel_cocoon.title: Steel cocoon
ach_steel_cocoon.description: Stop time around the station, freezing himself and Roy in eternal sleep.

ach_blood_trail.title: A trail of blood
ach_blood_trail.description: Die from losing too much blood near Tobias.

ach_scrap_perfectionist.title: Junk perfectionist
ach_scrap_perfectionist.description: Don't miss anything at the Scrap Heaps: three items and a tablet in your pocket.

ach_abandon_tobias.title: Every man for himself
ach_abandon_tobias.description: Leaving the wounded Tobias for dead in Act 2.

ach_hart_deal.title: Deal with the Devil
ach_hart_deal.description: Make a dubious deal with Dr. Hart.

ach_hart_enemy.title: Enemy of Science
ach_hart_enemy.description: Refuse Hart and make him an enemy.

ach_patriarch_sneak.title: Shadow in the ventilation
ach_patriarch_sneak.description: Deceive the Blind Patriarch and escape unnoticed.

ach_full_toolkit.title: Swiss knife
ach_full_toolkit.description: Collect a complete set of tools: magnetometer, crowbar, servo, clamps, chronometer and director's PDA.

ach_hydro_shortcut.title: Rat crawl
ach_hydro_shortcut.description: A shortcut through hydroponics, bypassing laboratories.

ach_corp_ending.title: Ghost of the Vanguard
ach_corp_ending.description: Hide in cold space, leaving Nemesis and her secrets to the corporation.

ach_no_man_left_behind.title: We don’t abandon our own
ach_no_man_left_behind.description: Drag the crippled Tobias to the final through all the circles of hell.

ach_toxicosis.title: Green Defender
ach_toxicosis.description: Receive toxic poisoning by tearing out a capsule of Omega Isolate.

ach_no_man_left_behind_workbench.title: We don’t abandon our own (workbench)
ach_no_man_left_behind_workbench.description: Alternative route: Rescue Tobias and bring him to the final by repairing the servo at the workbench.

ach_no_man_left_behind_bad.title: Aren't we abandoning our own?..
ach_no_man_left_behind_bad.description: You saved Tobias, but in the shuttle cockpit you gave him the last order. He covered you and was mortally wounded. You picked him up and carried him further - but will he remain alive?
